Model NameInput Layer 6.7

SubViews
SubViewDescriptionNotesObject

 

Table NameASST_PL
Functional NameAsset pool (subject to a Securitisation and other credit transfer)
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionAn Asset pool (subject to a Securitisation and other credit transfer) is a pool of assets that is subject to a Securitisation or other credit transfer. It may comprise Instruments or (parts of) Security positions that have been removed from the Reporting agents' balance sheet, e.g. in case of a Traditional securitisation using an SSPE, where the Reporting agents acts in the role of a Servicer.
Notes
Number Of Columns12
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
4ACCNTNG_STNDRDPYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5ASST_PL_IDPYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6ASST_PL_TYPYString (1) DOMAsset pool (subject to securitisation and other credit transfer) type
7CMPLNC_CRR_129_INDCTRYString (1) DOMCompliance with article 129 CRR type (Input Layer)
8PRMRY_ASST_CLSS_CVR_PLYString (1) DOMPrimary asset class of the cover pool (Input Layer)
9TRTMNT_TRNSFRRD_ASSTS_BLNC_SHTYString (1) DOMTreatment of transferred assets in balance sheet
10ASST_SPCFC_VLDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
11CRRYNG_AMNTDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
12PRSNT_VLDECIMAL (2)DOMPositive and negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5ASST_PL_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each asset pool.
6ASST_PL_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between asset pools for securitisations, covered bond programs and other credit transfers.
7CMPLNC_CRR_129_INDCTRCompliance with article 129 of CRR indicator indicates if the Asset pool (subject to a Covered bond programme) is in compliance with article 129 of Regulation (EU) No 575/213 (also known as CRR).
8PRMRY_ASST_CLSS_CVR_PLAsset class of the underlying asset pool subject to a covered bond according to CRR, Article 129 Exposure in the form of covered bonds.
9TRTMNT_TRNSFRRD_ASSTS_BLNC_SHTSpecifies the treatment of the underlying assets in the balance sheet, e.g. entirely derecognised.
10ASST_SPCFC_VLThe asset-specific value shall be the economic value of the cover pool assets, as may be described by a fair value in accordance with IFRS 13, a market value observable from executed transactions in liquid markets, or a present value that would discount future cash flows of an asset by an asset-specific interest rate curve.
11CRRYNG_AMNTThe carrying amount in accordance with Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.
12PRSNT_VLPresent Value (swap) shall be the sum of claims to payment of principal and interest, as discounted by a foreign exchange-specific risk-free yield curve, determined in accordance with the relevant statutory covered bond regime's rules that apply for determining sufficient coverage for the Asset pool (subject to a Covered bond programme).
Indexes
Index NameStateFunctionalSpatialExpressionColumn NameSort
Order
ASST_PL_PKPKDT_RFRNCASC
RPRTNG_AGNT_IDASC

Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1National GAAP not consistent with IFRS
2IFRS
3National GAAP consistent with IFRS
ASST_PL_TYP
Values List
ValueDescription
1Asset pool (subject to a Covered bond programme)
2Asset pool (subject to a credit transfer other than securitisation and covered bond programme)
3Asset pool (subject to a Securitisation)
CMPLNC_CRR_129_INDCTR
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1CRR Article 129 compliant Asset pool (subject to a Covered bond programme)
2CRR Article 129 non-compliant Asset pool (subject to a Covered bond programme)
PRMRY_ASST_CLSS_CVR_PL
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
aExposures to or guaranteed by central governments, ESCB central banks, public sector entities, regional governments or local authorities in the Union
bExposures to or guaranteed by third country central governments, third-country central banks, multilateral development banks, international organisations that fullfill specific requirements
cExposures to institutions that fullfilll specific requirements
dLoans secured by (i) residential property or (ii) senior units issued by French Fonds Communs de Titrisation or equivalent securitisation entities governed by the laws of a Member State securitising residential property exposures
eResidential loans fully guaranteed by an eligible rpotection provider
fLoans secured by (i) commercial immovable property or (ii) senior units issued by French Fonds Communs de Titrisation or equivalent securitisation entities governed by the law of a Member State securitising commercial immovable property exposures.
gLoans secured by maritime liens on ships up to the difference between 60% of the value of the pledged ship and the value of any prior maritime liens
hOther exposures
TRTMNT_TRNSFRRD_ASSTS_BLNC_SHT
Values List
ValueDescription
1Entirely recognised: Instrument entirely recognised, in accordance with Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.
2Recognised to the extent of the institution's continuing involvement: Instrument recognised to the extent of the institution's continuing involvement, in accordance with Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.
3Entirely derecognised: Instrument entirely derecognised, in accordance with Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014

Table NameASST_PL_CLLTRL_RCVD_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameAsset pool Collateral received assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionAn Asset pool Debt security position assignment is the combination of an Asset pool and a Debt security position that indicates which (part of a) Debt security position is comprised in which Asset pool.
Notes
Number Of Columns8
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
4ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5ASST_PL_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6CLLTRL_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7CLLTRL_RL_TYPPFYString (1) DOMCollateral role type (Input layer)
8TRNSFRRD_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5ASST_PL_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each asset pool.
6CLLTRL_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each collateral.
7CLLTRL_RL_TYPCollateral role type distiguishes the Collateral role according to the role the Collateral acts in.
8TRNSFRRD_AMNTThe amount of the nominal amount that has been transferred.

Table NameASST_PL_EXCHNG_TRDBL_DRVTV_PSTN_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameAsset pool Exchange tradable derivative position assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionAsset pool Exchange tradable derivative position is the combination of an Asset pool and an Exchange tradable derivative position that indicates which (part of an) Exchange tradable derivative position is comprised in which Asset pool.
Notes
Number Of Columns11
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1EXCHNG_TRDBL_DRVTV_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2BYR_ENTTY_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
3BYR_PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
4SLLR_ENTTY_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
5SLLR_PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
7RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
8ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
9ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
10ASST_PL_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
11MRKT_VLYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1EXCHNG_TRDBL_DRVTV_IDThe security identifier of the exchange tradable derivative.
2BYR_ENTTY_RL_TYPThe buyer party role.
3BYR_PRTY_IDThe party identifier of the involved buyer.
4SLLR_ENTTY_RL_TYPThe seller role.
5SLLR_PRTY_IDThe party identifier of the involved seller.
6DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
7RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
8ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
10ASST_PL_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each asset pool.
11MRKT_VLMarket value is the value in the market of the portion of the Exchange tradable derivative position that is used in the Asset pool as assigned in the Asset pool Exchange tradable derivative position assignment.

Table NameASST_PL_INSTRMNT_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameAsset pool Instrument assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionAsset pool Instrument assignment is the generalised combination of Asset pool and Instrument, that indicates which Instrument is part of which Asset pool.
Notes
Number Of Columns9
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
4ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5INSTRMNT_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6ASST_PL_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7ASST_PL_INSTRMNT_ASSGNMNT_TYPYString (1) DOMAsset pool Instrument assignment type
8PRCNTG_RTNDDECIMALDOMReal numbers from 0 to 1 with 6 decimals
9PRCNTG_TRNSFRRDDECIMALDOMReal numbers from 0 to 1 with 6 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5INSTRMNT_IDAn identifier applied by the reporting agent to uniquely identify each instrument under a single contract. Each instrument must have one instrument identifier. This value will not change over time and cannot be used as the instrument identifier for any other instrument under the same contract.
6ASST_PL_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each asset pool.
7ASST_PL_INSTRMNT_ASSGNMNT_TYPAsset pool Instrument assignment type distinguishes the various combinations between types of asset pool and types of instruments according to their nature.
8PRCNTG_RTNDThe percentage that has been retained.
9PRCNTG_TRNSFRRDThe percentage that has been transferred.
Indexes

Table NameASST_PL_LNG_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_SCRTY_PSTN_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameAsset pool Long balance sheet recognised security position assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionAn Asset pool long balance sheet recognised security position assignment is the combination of an Asset pool and a long balance sheet recognised security postion that indicates which (part of a) long balance sheet recognised security postion is comprised in which Asset pool.
Notes
Number Of Columns11
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3ASST_PL_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
6INVSTR_PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7INVSTR_ENTTY_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
8SCRTY_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
9LNG_SHRT_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_SCRTY_PSTN_TYPPFYStringDOMLong/Short balance sheet recognised security position type (Input Layer)
10SCRTY_PSTN_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_TYPPFYStringDOMSecurity position Balance sheet recognised type (Input Layer)
11TRNSFRRD_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3ASST_PL_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each asset pool.
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
6INVSTR_PRTY_IDAn identifier that uniquely identifies a party.
7INVSTR_ENTTY_RL_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between different roles a party may act in. Examples are debtor, creditor, servicer.
8SCRTY_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
11TRNSFRRD_AMNTThe amount of the nominal amount that has been transferred.

Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionAn Asset pool Non-balance sheet recognised security position assignment is the combination of an Asset pool and a Non-balance sheet recognised security postion that indicates which (part of a) Non-balance sheet recognised security postion is comprised in which Asset pool.

Number Of Columns10
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999

Expected Growth0

kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation

10TRNSFRRD_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals

Table NameBLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_NN_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_SCRTY_PSTN
Functional NameBalance sheet recognised/ Non-balance sheet recognised security position
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA Balance sheet/ non-balance security position is a security position that might be recognised or not in the balance sheet.
Notes
Number Of Columns15
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
3INVSTR_PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
4INVSTR_ENTTY_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
5DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
6ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
7SCRTY_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
8SCRTY_PSTN_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_TYPPYStringDOMSecurity position Balance sheet recognised type (Input Layer)
9AVLBL_ENCMBRNC_INDCTRYString (1) DOMAvailable for encumbrance indicator (Input layer)
10ENCMBRD_ASST_INDCTRYStringDOMEncumbered asset indicator (Input Layer)
11ENCMBRD_NMBR_SHRSDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
12ENCMBRD_NMNL_AMNTDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
13FVDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
14NMBR_SHRSDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
15NMNL_AMNTDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
2ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
3INVSTR_PRTY_IDAn identifier that uniquely identifies a party.
4INVSTR_ENTTY_RL_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between different roles a party may act in. Examples are debtor, creditor, servicer.
5DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
7SCRTY_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
9AVLBL_ENCMBRNC_INDCTRAvailable for encumbrance indicator distinguishes the asset into being available for asset encumbrance and not being available for asset encumbrance.
10ENCMBRD_ASST_INDCTREncumbered asset indicator signals whether the asset is encumbered or not.
11ENCMBRD_NMBR_SHRSThe number of shares that are encumbered according to ITS on Asset encumbrance, 1.7 Definition of encumbrance.
12ENCMBRD_NMNL_AMNTThe nominal amount that is encumbered according to ITS on Asset encumbrance, 1.7 Definition of encumbrance.
13FVFair value as defined in IFRS 13.9.
14NMBR_SHRSThe number of shares that are encumbered according to ITS on Asset encumbrance, 1.7 Definition of encumbrance.
15NMNL_AMNTThe nominal amount that is encumbered according to ITS on Asset encumbrance, 1.7 Definition of encumbrance.

Table NameCLLTRL
Functional NameCollateral
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionCollateral is an asset that is pledged to mitigate the credit risk that may arise from a contract that is not an Instrument.
Notes
Number Of Columns21
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
4ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5CLLTRL_IDPYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6SCRTY_IDFString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7CLLTRL_ANNX_PRTCTN_IDFString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
8CLLTRL_TYPYString (3) DOMCollateral type (Input Layer)
9CRRNCYYString (3) DOMSubdomain for domain ISO-4217 Currency Codes (ISO4217 Domain) (Input Layer)
10NN_MMBR_STT_CNTRY_CDYString (2) DOMISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code of the country (Input Layer)
11PLNNNG_PRMSSN_INDCTRYString (1) DOMPlanning permission indicator (Input Layer)
12RGSTRD_PHYSCL_CLLTRL_INDCTRYString (2) DOMRegistered collateral indicator (Input Layer)
13RL_ESTT_CLLTRL_LCTN_TYPYString (2) DOMReal estate collateral location type (Input Layer)
14TRRTRL_UNTYString (5) DOMNUTS 3 codes (Input Layer)
15TYP_PRTCTN_VL_APPRCHYString (1) DOMType of protection valuation approach (Input Layer)
16UNDR_CNSTRCTN_INDCTRYString (1) DOMUnder construction or development indicator (Input Layer)
17FV_AMNT_CLLTRLStringDOMMonetary
18LT_SSTNBL_VLStringDOMMonetary
19MRKT_VLDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
20NTNL_AMNTDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
21PSTL_CDString (255) DOMString up to 255 characters - latin extended
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5CLLTRL_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each collateral.
6SCRTY_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
7CLLTRL_ANNX_PRTCTN_IDThe protection arrangement of the collateral annex.
9CRRNCYThe currency code according to ISO4217.
10NN_MMBR_STT_CNTRY_CDThe country code of the non-reporting member state.
11PLNNNG_PRMSSN_INDCTRPlanning permission for development indicator distinguishes Land excluding agriculture based on whether planning permission for development applies or not.
13RL_ESTT_CLLTRL_LCTN_TYPReal estate collateral location type is a discriminator to distinguish between real estate collateral located in a member state or not in a member state.
14TRRTRL_UNTThe region inside a country according to NUTS.
15TYP_PRTCTN_VL_APPRCHType of protection valuation approach.
16UNDR_CNSTRCTN_INDCTRUnder construction or development indicator indicates whether the property is under construction or development.

Finrep Annex V. Part 2.350, 352(a). With regard to collateral in the form of immovable property (a) immovable property that is under construction or development.
17FV_AMNT_CLLTRLFair value of the collateral as defined in IFRS 13.9.
18LT_SSTNBL_VLLong-term sustainable value amount of the collateral is the  ‘mortgage lending value’ of immovable property as defined in Article 4(1)(74) of Regulation (EU) No 575/2013. To be used if the protection is immovable property when the 'mortgage lending value' is reported in the data attribute 'Protection value'.
19MRKT_VLThe market value of collateral.
20NTNL_AMNTThe notional amount on a financial instrument is the nominal or face amount that is used to calculate payments made on that instrument.
21PSTL_CDEntity's postal code.

UKZZZExtra-Regio NUTS 3
TYP_PRTCTN_VL_APPRCH
Values List
ValueDescription
1Counterparty estimation: Valuation method whereby the valuation is carried out by the provider of the protection. 
2Creditor valuation: Valuation method whereby the valuation is carried out by the creditor: valuation undertaken by an external or staff appraiser who possesses the necessary qualifications, ability and experience to execute a valuation and who is not independent from the credit decision process. 
3Mark-to-market: Valuation method whereby the protection value is based on unadjusted quoted prices for identical assets and liabilities in an active market. 
5Third-party valuation: Valuation method in which the valuation is provided by an appraiser who is independent from the credit decision process.

ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Under construction or development
2Not under construction or development

Table NameCLLTRL_GVN_INSTRMNT_DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameCollateral given instrument Debt security issued assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionCollateral given instrument Debt security issued assignment is the combination of Collateral given instrument and Debt security issued that indicates which Debt security issued is protected by which Collateral given instrument.
Notes
Number Of Columns9
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
4ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5INSTRMNT_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMInstrument role type
6INSTRMNT_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
8ACCNTNG_CLSSFCTNPFYString (2) DOMAccounting classification for liabilities
9PRTCTN_ALLCTD_VLYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5INSTRMNT_RL_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between different roles an instrument may act in. Examples are financial asset instrument, financial liability instrument.
6INSTRMNT_IDAn identifier applied by the reporting agent to uniquely identify each instrument under a single contract. Each instrument must have one instrument identifier. This value will not change over time and cannot be used as the instrument identifier for any other instrument under the same contract.
7DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_IDThe security identifier of the involved debt security.
8ACCNTNG_CLSSFCTNAccounting portfolio where the asset or liability is recorded in accordance with the accounting standard – IFRS or national GAAP –under Regulation (EU) 2015/534 (ECB/2015/13) applied by the observed agent's legal entity.
9PRTCTN_ALLCTD_VLThe maximum amount of the protection value that can be considered as credit protection for the instrument. The amount of the existing third parties or observed agent priority claims against the protection must be excluded in the protection allocated value. For protections that is eligible under Regulation (EU) No 575/2013, this value should be reported in accordance with Part 2 of Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.
Indexes
Index NameStateFunctionalSpatialExpressionColumn NameSort
Order

ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1National GAAP not consistent with IFRS

INSTRMNT_RL_TYP
Values List
ValueDescription
3Financial asset instrument
4Financial liability instrument
44Serviced asset instrument
5Off-balance sheet item given instrument
6Off-balance sheet item received instrument
7Collateral received instrument
8Collateral given instrument
ACCNTNG_CLSSFCTN
Values List
ValueDescription
21IFRS: Financial liabilities measured at amortised cost: Financial liabilities measured at amortised cost in accordance with IFRS
23IFRS: Financial liabilities held for trading: Financial liabilities held for trading in accordance with IFRS
25IFRS: Financial liabilities designated at fair value through profit or loss: Financial liabilities designated at fair value through profit or loss in accordance with IFRS
31nGAAP: Non-trading non-derivative financial liabilities measured at a cost-based method: Non-trading non-derivative financial liabilities measured at a cost-based method accordance with national GAAP based on BAD
33nGAAP: Trading financial liabilities: Trading financial liabilities in accordance with national GAAP based on BAD
35nGAAP: Financial liabilities designated at fair value through profit or loss: Financial liabilities designated at fair value through profit or loss in accordance with nationa GAAP based on BAD
852nGAAP: Accounting portfolios for trading financial liabilities. Cost based method or LOCOM

Table NameCLLTRL_RL
Functional NameCollateral role
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionCollateral role is a role the Collateral may act in.
Notes
Number Of Columns12
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
4ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5CLLTRL_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6CLLTRL_RL_TYPPYString (1) DOMCollateral role type (Input layer)
7AVLBL_ENCMBRNC_INDCTRYString (1) DOMAvailable for encumbrance indicator (Input layer)
8CLLTRL_RS_INDCTRYStringDOMColllateral reuse indicator (Input Layer)
9ENCMBRD_ASST_INDCTRYStringDOMEncumbered asset indicator (Input Layer)
10DT_ORGNL_PRTCTN_VLDateDOMAll possible dates
11DT_PRTCTN_VLDateDOMAll possible dates
12ORGNL_PRTCTN_VLDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5CLLTRL_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each collateral.
6CLLTRL_RL_TYPCollateral role type distiguishes the Collateral role according to the role the Collateral acts in.
7AVLBL_ENCMBRNC_INDCTRAvailable for encumbrance indicator distinguishes the asset into being available for asset encumbrance and not being available for asset encumbrance.
8CLLTRL_RS_INDCTRCollateral reuse indicator distinguishes Collateral into those that have been used once, and those that have been reused by the financial organisation.
9ENCMBRD_ASST_INDCTREncumbered asset indicator signals whether the asset is encumbered or not.
10DT_ORGNL_PRTCTN_VLThe date of the protection’s original value, i.e. the date on which the latest appraisal or valuation of the protection was carried out prior to its initial receipt as a credit protection.
11DT_PRTCTN_VLProtection value date is the date on which the latest appraisal or valuation of the protection was carried out prior to the reporting reference date.
12ORGNL_PRTCTN_VLThe protection’s fair value at the date when it was originally received as a credit protection.

Table NameCRDT_FCLTY
Functional NameCredit facility with interest rate
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA Credit facility is a commitment (revocable or irrevocable) made by a financial institution to make an amount of money available to the customer (or a plurality of customers), or to assume for it an obligation to a third party. The commitment is based on an agreement between the financial institution and the customer, which originates from a request of the customer or an acceptance by the customer of a proposal from the financial institution.

Please note that the Credit facility is always off-balance sheet given.
Notes
Number Of Columns37
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
4ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework
5CRDT_FCLTY_IDPYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6FNNCL_CNTRCT_IDFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7ACCMLTD_CHNGS_FVYDECIMAL (2)DOMPositive and negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
8ACCMLTD_CHNGS_FV_CRYDECIMAL (2)DOMPositive and negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
9ACCMLTD_NGTV_VL_ADJSTMNT_CRYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
10ACCMLTD_NGTV_VL_ADJSTMNT_MRYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
11ACCNTNG_CLSSFCTNYString (3) DOMAccounting classification applicable to off-balance sheet items
12APPRCH_CRDT_QLTY_STTSYString (1) DOMAssessment approach for credit quality status - full domain
13CRDT_FCLTY_INCPTN_DTYDateDOMAll possible dates
14CRRNCYYString (3) DOMSubdomain for domain ISO-4217 Currency Codes (ISO4217 Domain)
15DT_LGL_FNL_MTRTYYDateDOMAll possible dates
16DT_PRFRMNG_STTSYDateDOMAll possible dates
17DT_STTLMNTYDateDOMAll possible dates
18ENCMBRD_ASST_INDCTRYString (3) DOMEncumbered asset indicator
19FRBRNC_MSR_TYPYString (2) DOMForbearance measure type
20FRZNG_PRD_DYSYIntegerDOMNon-negative integers
21FVYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
22GNRL_ALLWNCS_BNK_RSKYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
23GNRL_ALLWNCS_CRDT_RSKYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
24IMPRMNT_STTSYString (3) DOMImpairment status
25NMNL_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
26NN_PRFRMNG_PRR_FRBRNC_INDCTRYString (1) DOMNon-performing prior to forbearance indicator
27PRFRMNG_FRBRN_EXPSR_UNDR_PRBTN_RCLSSFD_NN_PRFRMNG_INDCTRYString (1) DOMNon-performing prior to forbearance indicator
28PRFRMNG_STTSYString (2) DOMPerforming status
29PRFRMNG_STTS_RSNYString (1) DOMPerforming status reason
30PRVSNS_OFF_BLNC_SHTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
31RNGTTD_CRDT_FCLTY_TYPYStringDOMRenegotiated credit facility type
32RTL_EXPSR_ACCRDNG_CRR_INDCTRYString (1) DOMRetail exposure accordign to CRR, Article 123 (b) indicator
33RVCBL_INDCTRYString (1) DOMRevocable indicator
34TYP_CRDT_FCLTYYString (2) DOMType of credit facility
35ANNLSD_AGRD_RTDECIMAL (6)DOMReal numbers positive or negative with 6 decimals
36DT_FRBRNC_MSRSDateDOMAll possible dates
37DT_RNGTTN_STTSDateDOMAll possible dates
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5CRDT_FCLTY_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each credit facility.
6FNNCL_CNTRCT_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each financial contract.
7ACCMLTD_CHNGS_FVAmount of gains and losses from re-measurement of the asset accumulated from the initial recognition to the reference date.
8ACCMLTD_CHNGS_FV_CRAccumulated changes in fair value due to credit risk in accordance with Part 2.46 of Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.
9ACCMLTD_NGTV_VL_ADJSTMNT_CRAccumulated negative value adjustments. Market risk induced
10ACCMLTD_NGTV_VL_ADJSTMNT_MRAccumulated negative value adjustments. Market risk induced
11ACCNTNG_CLSSFCTNAccounting portfolio where the asset or liability is recorded in accordance with the accounting standard – IFRS or national GAAP –under Regulation (EU) 2015/534 (ECB/2015/13) applied by the observed agent's legal entity.
12APPRCH_CRDT_QLTY_STTSApproach chosen by the institution to apply the definitions of default, according to Article 178 of Regulation (EU) No 575/2013, and of non-performing, according to Regulation (EU) No 680/2014, Annex V, Part 2.154.
13CRDT_FCLTY_INCPTN_DTThe date on which the current contractual relationship originated, i.e. the date on which the contract agreement became binding for all parties.
14CRRNCYThe currency code according to ISO4217.
15DT_LGL_FNL_MTRTYThe contractual maturity date of the asset or liability, taking into account any agreements amending initial contracts.
16DT_PRFRMNG_STTSThe date on which the performing status is considered to have been established or changed.
17DT_STTLMNTThe date on which the conditions specified in the contract are or can be executed for the first time, i.e. the date on which financial instruments are initially exchanged or created.
18ENCMBRD_ASST_INDCTREncumbered asset indicator signals whether the asset is encumbered or not.
19FRBRNC_MSR_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between refinanced debt, instruments with modified interest rate below market value and other modified terms.
20FRZNG_PRD_DYSThe number of days (if any) for which the freezing period of the asset has been applied, in accordance with EBA guidelines 2016/07 paragraph 18.
21FVFair value as defined in IFRS 13.9.
22GNRL_ALLWNCS_BNK_RSKGeneral allowances for bank risk affecting carrying amount (nGAAP)
23GNRL_ALLWNCS_CRDT_RSKGeneral allowances for credit risk affecting carrying amount (nGAAP)
24IMPRMNT_STTSType of impairment recorded in accordance with the accounting standard – IFRS or national GAAP.
25NMNL_AMNTHolding amount at nominal value
26NN_PRFRMNG_PRR_FRBRNC_INDCTRAn indicator specifying if an exposure was non-performing prior to the extension of forbearance measures.
27PRFRMNG_FRBRN_EXPSR_UNDR_PRBTN_RCLSSFD_NN_PRFRMNG_INDCTRAn indicator specifying if an asset is classified as Non-performing forborne exposure under probation reclassified from non-performing or not according to Regulation (EU) 680/2014, Annex V, part 2.260.
28PRFRMNG_STTSPerforming status in accordance with Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.
29PRFRMNG_STTS_RSNThe reason for the choice of Performing status
30PRVSNS_OFF_BLNC_SHTThe amount of provisions for off-balance sheet amounts.
32RTL_EXPSR_ACCRDNG_CRR_INDCTRAn indicator specifying if a credit facility is considered a retail exposure according to Regulation (EU) 575/2013, Article 178, subparagraph following (b).
33RVCBL_INDCTRRevocable indicator is an indicator specifying if the Credit facility is revocable or not
34TYP_CRDT_FCLTYClassification of the credit facility.
35ANNLSD_AGRD_RTAnnualised agreed rate or narrowly defined interest rate in accordance with Regulation (EU) No 1072/2013 of the European Central Bank (ECB/2013/34).
36DT_FRBRNC_MSRSThe date on which forbearance measure have been applied.
37DT_RNGTTN_STTSThe date on which the renegotiation status is considered to have been established or changed.

Values List
ValueDescription
90Under IFRS 9 impairment: Off balance sheet accounting classification: under IFRS 9 impairment
911Measured under IAS 37: Off balance sheet accounting classification: measured under IAS 37

93Under nGAAP: Off balance sheet accounting classification: measured under nGAAP based on BAD

ENCMBRD_ASST_INDCTR
Values List
ValueDescription
1Not encumbered asset
100Encumbered asset
FRBRNC_MSR_TYP
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Grace period/payment moratorium
10Forborne: instruments with modified interest rate below market conditions
11Forborne: instruments with modified interest rate not below market conditions
3Extension of maturity/term
4Rescheduled payments
5Debt forgiveness
6Debt asset swaps
7Other forbearance measures
8Forborne: Refinanced debt
9Forborne: instruments with other modified terms and conditions
IMPRMNT_STTS
Values List
ValueDescription
211General allowances for credit risk (GAAP)
212General allowances for banking risk (GAAP)
23Stage 1 (IFRS): To be used if the instrument is not impaired and a loss allowance at an amount equal to 12-month expected credit losses is raised against the instrument under IFRS. Only for instruments subject to impairment under IFRS 9.
24Stage 2 (IFRS): To be used if the instrument is not impaired and a loss allowance at an amount equal to lifetime expected credit losses is raised against the instrument under IFRS. Only for instruments subject to impairment under IFRS 9.
25Stage 3 (IFRS): To be used if the instrument is impaired and a loss allowance at an amount equal to lifetime expected credit losses is raised against the instrument under IFRS. Only for instruments subject to impairment under IFRS 9.
26Specific allowances (GAAP): To be used if the instrument is subject to impairment in accordance with an applied accounting standard other than IFRS 9 and specific loss allowances are raised, irrespective of whether these allowances are individually or collectively assessed (impaired
27Purchased or originated credit-impaired instruments (POCI) (IFRS)
NN_PRFRMNG_PRR_FRBRNC_INDCTR
Values List
ValueDescription
1Non-performing prior to forbearance
2Not non-performing prior to forbearance
PRFRMNG_FRBRN_EXPSR_UNDR_PRBTN_RCLSSFD_NN_PRFRMNG_INDCTR
Values List
ValueDescription
1Non-performing prior to forbearance
2Not non-performing prior to forbearance
PRFRMNG_STTS
Values List
ValueDescription
1Non-performing
11Performing
PRFRMNG_STTS_RSN
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Failed reclassification to performing at end of probation period
2Exited from Non-performing exposure (NPE) in the last 12 months
RNGTTD_CRDT_FCLTY_TYP
Values List
ValueDescription
1Renegotiated credit facility
2Non-renegotiated credit facility
RTL_EXPSR_ACCRDNG_CRR_INDCTR
Values List
ValueDescription
1Retail exposure accordign to CRR, Article 123 (b)
2Not retail exposure accordign to CRR, Article 123 (b)
RVCBL_INDCTR
Values List
ValueDescription
1Revocable
2Not revocable
TYP_CRDT_FCLTY
Values List
ValueDescription
12To lend or to provide acceptance facilities at a below-market interest rate
13To lend or to provide acceptance facilities under pre-specified terms and conditions other than those at a below-market interest rate
14To lend or to provide acceptance facilities where the terms and conditions are not under pre-specified
15To provide guarantees
16To purchase securities
17For tender and performance guarantees
18Other Credit Facilities: Other

Table NameCRDT_FCLTY_CLLTRL_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameCredit facility Collateral received assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA Credit facility Collateral assignment is the combination of a Credit facility and a Collateral that indicates which Credit facility is assigned to which Collateral.
Notes
Number Of Columns7
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1CRDT_FCLTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
6CLLTRL_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7CLLTRL_RL_TYPPFYString (1) DOMCollateral role type (Input layer)
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1CRDT_FCLTY_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each credit facility.
2DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
6CLLTRL_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each collateral.
7CLLTRL_RL_TYPCollateral role type distiguishes the Collateral role according to the role the Collateral acts in.

Table NameCRDT_FCLTY_CLLTRL_RCVD_INSTRMNT_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameCredit facility Collateral received instrument assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA Credit facility Collateral received instrument assignment is the combination of a Credit facility and a Collateral received instrument that indicates which Credit facility is protected by which Collateral received instrument.
Notes
Number Of Columns8
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1CRDT_FCLTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
5ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework
6INSTRMNT_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7INSTRMNT_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMInstrument role type
8PRTCTN_ALLCTD_VLYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1CRDT_FCLTY_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each credit facility.
2DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
6INSTRMNT_IDThe instrument identifier of the involved collateral received instrument.
7INSTRMNT_RL_TYPThe collateral received instrument role.
8PRTCTN_ALLCTD_VLThe maximum amount of the protection value that can be considered as credit protection for the instrument. The amount of the existing third parties or observed agent priority claims against the protection must be excluded in the protection allocated value. For protections that is eligible under Regulation (EU) No 575/2013, this value should be reported in accordance with Part 2 of Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.

Notes
Number Of Columns8
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0

Table NameCRDT_RSK_MTGTN_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameCredit risk mitigation assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA credit risk mitigation membership is the combination of a Credit risk mitigation arrangement and a Protection item that indicates which Protection item is comprised in which Credit risk mitigation arrangement. 
Please note that the many-to-many relationship (established via this entity) is only applicable to Registered protection (and saving accounts where there exists a physical document (i.e. Sparbuch)), for all other Protection items the relationship between the Credit risk mitigation arrangement and the Protection item is of type one-to-many.
Notes
Number Of Columns6
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear

2DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)

Table NameCSH_HND
Functional NameCash on hand
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

Description‘Cash on hand’ shall include holdings of national and foreign banknotes and coins in circulation that are commonly used to make payments.

According to ESA 2010 this includes "Monetary gold", which is indicated via the currency "XAU". See ESA 2010 paragraph 5.65 - 5.68.
Notes
Number Of Columns8
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level
4ACCNTNG_STNDRDPYString (1) DOMAccounting framework
5CRRNCYPYString (3) DOMSubdomain for domain ISO-4217 Currency Codes (ISO4217 Domain)
6HLD_SL_INDCTRPYString (1) DOMHeld for sale indicator
7ENCMBRD_ASST_INDCTRPYString (3) DOMEncumbered asset indicator
8CRRYNG_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5CRRNCYThe currency code according to ISO4217.
6HLD_SL_INDCTRIndicates the Non-current assets and instruments in disposal groups classified as held for sale in accordance with IFRS5. Is not applicable under national GAAP based on BAD.
7ENCMBRD_ASST_INDCTREncumbered asset indicator signals whether the asset is encumbered or not.
8CRRYNG_AMNTThe carrying amount in accordance with Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.

Table NameCVRD_BND_PRGRMM_RLVNT_RGM_EXCSS
Functional NameCovered bond programme relevant regime excess
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA covered bond programme is a form of credit transfer that involves the sale of a package of loans to a another financial institution for resale.
Notes
Number Of Columns8
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
4ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5CVRD_BND_PRGRM_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6EXCSS_CVRG_ASST_SPCFC_VLDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
7EXCSS_CVRG_NMNL_AMNTDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
8EXCSS_CVRG_PRSNT_VL_MRKT_VLDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5CVRD_BND_PRGRM_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each covered bond program.
6EXCSS_CVRG_ASST_SPCFC_VLExcess coverage asset-specific value is the aggregate of the Excess coverage asset-specific value of the assets in the cover pool according to the relevant statutory covered bond regime.

The asset-specific value is the economic value of the cover pool assets, as may be described by a fair value according to IFRS 13, a market value observable from executed transactions in liquid markets, or a present value that would discount future cash flows of an asset by an assetspecific interest rate curve.

7EXCSS_CVRG_NMNL_AMNTExcess coverage nominal amount is the amount in excess of the minimum coverage required with regards to the nominal amount according to the relevant statutory covered bond regime for the Covered bond programme.

Nominal amount is the sum of claims to payment of principal, determined in accordance with the respective statutory covered bond regime's rules that apply for determining sufficient coverage. 
8EXCSS_CVRG_PRSNT_VL_MRKT_VLExcess coverage present value(swap) / market value is the aggregate of the present value (swap) of the cover pool and the market value of the derived assets in the cover pool according to the relevant statutory covered bond regime.

The asset-specific value is the economic value of the cover pool assets, as may be described by a fair value according to IFRS 13, a market value observable from executed transactions in liquid markets, or a present value that would discount future cash flows of an asset by an assetspecific interest rate curve.

Table NameDBT_SCRTY_ISSD
Functional NameDebt security issued (by the reporting agent)
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA Debt security issued (by the Reporting agent) is the combination of the  Debt security where the Reporting agent is the Debtor and the accounting classification that represents the financial liability side of the Debt security issued (by the reporting agent).

Please note: 
- The overall information about the Debt security issued (by the reporting agent) is in the entity type Debt security.
- The asset side of the bought back and/or retained part of the Debt security issued (by the reporting agent) is in the entity type Long debt security position.
Notes
Number Of Columns23
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
4ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6ACCNTNG_CLSSFCTNPYString (2) DOMAccounting classification for liabilities
7ASST_ENCMBRNC_SRC_INDCTRYString (1) DOMAsset encumbrance source indicator
8CRRYNG_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
9DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_PRDNTL_PRTFL_TYPYString (2) DOMDebt Security Issued prudential portfolio type (Input Layer)
10DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_TYPYString (2) DOMDebt security issued type
11FV_HRRCHYYString (1) DOMFair value hierarchy (Input Layer)
12FVO_DSGNTNYString (1) DOMFair value option designation (Input layer)
13HLD_SL_INDCTRYString (1) DOMHeld for sale indicator
14NMNL_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
15NN_PRFRMNG_PRR_FRBRNC_INDCTRYString (1) DOMNon-performing prior to forbearance indicator
16PRSNT_VLYDECIMAL (2)DOMPositive and negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
17TYP_PRDCTYString (3) DOMType of product for debt securities issued
18ACCMLTD_CHNGS_FVDECIMAL (2)DOMPositive and negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
19ACCMLTD_CHNGS_FV_CRDECIMAL (2)DOMPositive and negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
20FVDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
21FV_CHNGDECIMAL (2)DOMPositive and negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
22HRCTS_TRDNG_PSTN_FVDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
23STRT_DT_PRDDateDOMAll possible dates
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_IDThe security identifier of the involved debt security.
6ACCNTNG_CLSSFCTNAccounting portfolio where the asset or liability is recorded in accordance with the accounting standard – IFRS or national GAAP –under Regulation (EU) 2015/534 (ECB/2015/13) applied by the observed agent's legal entity.
7ASST_ENCMBRNC_SRC_INDCTRAsset encumbrance source indicator signals whether the liabity or off-balance sheet item is a source of encumbrance for an asset or not.
8CRRYNG_AMNTThe carrying amount in accordance with Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.

"the carrying amount" means the amount to be reported in the balance sheet. 
The carrying amount of financial instruments shall include accrued interest. Under the relevant national GAAP based on BAD, the carrying amount of derivatives either shall be the carrying amount under national GAAP including accruals, premium values and provisions if applicable, or it shall be equal to zero where derivatives are not recognised on-balance sheet.
9DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_PRDNTL_PRTFL_TYPDebt security issued prudential portfolio type distinguishes Debt security issued (by the reporting agent) according to where in the prudential portfolio the liability is recorded, banking or trading book.
11FV_HRRCHYLevel of fair value of a financial instruments according to the hierarchy defined in IFRS 13. Applicable to national GAAP based on BAD only if the allocation of instruments is measured at fair value according to different levels.
13HLD_SL_INDCTRHeld for sale  indicates the Non-current assets and instruments in disposal groups classified as held for sale in accordance with IFRS5. Is not applicable under national GAAP based on BAD.
14NMNL_AMNTHolding amount at nominal value
15NN_PRFRMNG_PRR_FRBRNC_INDCTRNon-performing prior to forbearance specifies if an asset that is a debt security issued (by the reporting agent) is classified as non-performing prior to forbearance according to Regulation (EU) 680/2014, Annex V, part 2.263.
16PRSNT_VLPresent Value (swap) shall be the sum of claims to payment of principal and interest, as discounted by a foreign exchange-specific risk-free yield curve, determined in accordance with the relevant statutory covered bond regime's rules that apply for determining sufficient coverage for the Debt security (issued by the reporting agent).
17TYP_PRDCTType of product
18ACCMLTD_CHNGS_FVAmount of gains and losses from re-measurement of the asset accumulated from the initial recognition to the reference date.
19ACCMLTD_CHNGS_FV_CRAccumulated changes in fair value due to credit risk in accordance with Part 2.46 of Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.
20FVFair value as defined in IFRS 13.9.
21FV_CHNGFair value changes in the period and before taxes.
22HRCTS_TRDNG_PSTN_FVHaircut for trading position valued at fair value. 
According to Annex V (5.29):
Where applicable under national GAAP based on BAD, ‘Haircuts for trading positions valued at fair value’ shall be reported. The haircuts decrease the value of trading assets and increase the value of trading liabilities.
23STRT_DT_PRDThe start date of the period.

0Not applicable

Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1National GAAP not consistent with IFRS

ACCNTNG_CLSSFCTN
Values List
ValueDescription
21IFRS: Financial liabilities measured at amortised cost: Financial liabilities measured at amortised cost in accordance with IFRS
23IFRS: Financial liabilities held for trading: Financial liabilities held for trading in accordance with IFRS
25IFRS: Financial liabilities designated at fair value through profit or loss: Financial liabilities designated at fair value through profit or loss in accordance with IFRS
31nGAAP: Non-trading non-derivative financial liabilities measured at a cost-based method: Non-trading non-derivative financial liabilities measured at a cost-based method accordance with national GAAP based on BAD
33nGAAP: Trading financial liabilities: Trading financial liabilities in accordance with national GAAP based on BAD
35nGAAP: Financial liabilities designated at fair value through profit or loss: Financial liabilities designated at fair value through profit or loss in accordance with nationa GAAP based on BAD
852nGAAP: Accounting portfolios for trading financial liabilities. Cost based method or LOCOM
ASST_ENCMBRNC_SRC_INDCTR
Values List
ValueDescription
1Asset encumbrance source
2Not an asset encumbrance source
DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_PRDNTL_PRTFL_TYP
Values List
ValueDescription
22Issued debt security in the banking book
23Issued debt security in the trading book International Financial Reporting Standard (IFRS)
24Issued debt security in the trading book national general accepted accounting principles (nGAAP)
DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_TYP
Values List
ValueDescription
15Fair-valued debt security issued
16Non-fair-valued debt security issued
FV_HRRCHY
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Level 1: Level 1 inputs used for the measurement of fair value. Level 1 inputs are quoted prices in active markets for identical assets or liabilities that the entity can access at the measurement date
2Level 2: Level 2 inputs used for the measurment of fair value. Level 2 inputs are inputs other than quoted prices included within Level 1 that are observable for the asset or liability, either directly or indirectly
3Level 3: Level 3 inputs used for the measurment of fair value. Level 3 inputs are unobservable inputs for the asset or liability
FVO_DSGNTN
Values List
ValueDescription
1Accounting mismatch
2Management on a fair value basis
3Hybrid contract
5Management of credit risk. Upon designation
6"Management of credit risk. After the designation
HLD_SL_INDCTR
Values List
ValueDescription
1Held for sale: The member indicates that the instrument is held for sale
2Not held for sale: The member indicates that the instrument is not held for sale
NN_PRFRMNG_PRR_FRBRNC_INDCTR
Values List
ValueDescription
1Non-performing prior to forbearance
2Not non-performing prior to forbearance
TYP_PRDCT
Values List
ValueDescription
610Certificates of deposits
620Asset-backed securities
630Covered bonds
640Hybrid contracts
650Other debt securities issued
651Other debt securities issued - convertible compound financial instruments
652Other debt securities issued - non-convertible

Table NameDBT_SCRTY_ISSD_HDG
Functional NameDebt security issued (by the reporting agent) as a hedge
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionDebt security issued (by the reporting agent) as a hedge is a Debt security issued (by the reporting agent) role where the Debt security issued (by the reporting agent) acts in the role of a non-derivative hedge.
Notes
Number Of Columns8
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0

NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes

Values List
ValueDescription
21IFRS: Financial liabilities measured at amortised cost: Financial liabilities measured at amortised cost in accordance with IFRS
23IFRS: Financial liabilities held for trading: Financial liabilities held for trading in accordance with IFRS
25IFRS: Financial liabilities designated at fair value through profit or loss: Financial liabilities designated at fair value through profit or loss in accordance with IFRS
31nGAAP: Non-trading non-derivative financial liabilities measured at a cost-based method: Non-trading non-derivative financial liabilities measured at a cost-based method accordance with national GAAP based on BAD

TYP_HDG
Values List
ValueDescription
1Fair value hedge: Hedging relationship as defined in IFRS 9.6.5.2 (a)
11Hedges other than cash flow hedge and hedge of net investment in a foreign operation: Economic hedge
12Economic hedge. With use of fair value option
13Economic hedge. Other
2Cash flow hedge: Hedging relationship as defined in IFRS 9.6.5.2 (b)
3Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation: Hedging relationship as defined in IFRS 9.6.5.2 (c)
4Portfolio fair value hedges of interest rate risk: Hedging relationship as defined in IAS39.AG 114-132
5Portfolio cash flow hedges of interest rate risk: Hedging relationship as defined in IAS39.AG 114-132
6Cost-price hedge: Hedging relationship as defined in Reg. 680/2014, Annex V, part 2.114. This hedging relationship is applicable only under nGAAP based on BAD
7Other than Fair value hedge, Cash flow hedge, Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation, Portfolio fair value hedges of interest rate risk, Portfolio cash flow hedges of interest rate risk, Cost-price hedge: Other applicable hedging relationship for nGAAP based on BAD reporters

Table NameDBT_SCRTY_ISSD_PRTCN_ARRNGMNT_GVN_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameDebt security issued (by the reporting agent) Protection arrangement given assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionDebt security issued (by the reporting agent) Protection arrangement assignment is the combination of Debt security issued and Protection arrangement stating which Debt security issued is protected by which Protection arrangement.
Notes
Number Of Columns10
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
4ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6ACCNTNG_CLSSFCTNPFYString (2) DOMAccounting classification for liabilities
7PRTCTN_ARRNGMNT_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
8PRTCTN_ARRNGMNT_RL_TYPPFYString (1) DOMProtection arrangement role type (Input layer)
9ALLCTD_UNSD_CLLTRL_VLYDECIMALDOMReal numbers with 2 decimals
10PRTCTN_ALLCTD_VLYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_IDThe security identifier of the involved debt security.
6ACCNTNG_CLSSFCTNAccounting portfolio where the asset or liability is recorded in accordance with the accounting standard – IFRS or national GAAP –under Regulation (EU) 2015/534 (ECB/2015/13) applied by the observed agent's legal entity.
7PRTCTN_ARRNGMNT_IDAn identifier to univocally identify each protection arragement.
8PRTCTN_ARRNGMNT_RL_TYPProtection arrangement role type distinguishes the Protection arrangement role according to their nature.
9ALLCTD_UNSD_CLLTRL_VLAllocated unused collateral value is an amount that expresses the protection value that is not used for risk mitigation and, for FINREP reporting purposes is allocated to a specific Loan and advance, which is the Long non-negotiable security position.
10PRTCTN_ALLCTD_VLProtection allocated value is the maximum amount of the protection value, via the Protection arrangement, that can be considered as credit protection for the Long security position. For protections that is eligible under Regulation (EU) No 575/2013, this value should be reported in accordance with Part 2 of Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.

Table NameDBT_SCRTY_ISSD_TRDTNL_SCRTSTN_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameDebt security issued (by the reporting agent) Traditional securitisation assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionDebt security issued (by the reporting agent) Traditional securitisation assignment is the combination of Debt security issued (by the reporting agent) and Traditional securitisation assignment that indicates which Debt security issued (by the reporting agent) is assigned to which Traditional securitisation assignment.
Notes
Number Of Columns7
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1SCRTSTN_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
5ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
6ACCNTNG_CLSSFCTNPFYString (2) DOMAccounting classification for liabilities
7DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1SCRTSTN_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
2DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
6ACCNTNG_CLSSFCTNAccounting portfolio where the asset or liability is recorded in accordance with the accounting standard – IFRS or national GAAP –under Regulation (EU) 2015/534 (ECB/2015/13) applied by the observed agent's legal entity.
7DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_IDThe security identifier of the involved debt security.

Table NameENTTY_RL
Functional NameEntity role
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionAn Entity role is a role a Party (or a subtype of Party) may act in.
Notes
Number Of Columns10
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
3DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
4PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
5ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
6ENTTY_RL_TYPPYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
7EQTYDECIMAL (2)DOMPositive and negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
8PRFT_LSSDECIMAL (2)DOMPositive and negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
9SHR_CPTLDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
10TTL_ASSTSDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
2ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
3DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
4PRTY_IDThe party identifier of the involved organisation.
6ENTTY_RL_TYPThe organisation role.
7EQTYEquity at the last financial statement (see Finrep annex V 296.f)
8PRFT_LSSProfit or loss.
9SHR_CPTLShare capital according to Regulation (EU) 680/2014, Annex V, part 2.296(e): "‘Share capital of investee’ means the total amount of capital issued by the investee as at the reference date;"
10TTL_ASSTSTotal assets.

Table NameEQT_INSTRMNT_NT_SCRT_HDG
Functional NameEquity instrument that is not a security as a hedge
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionLoan and advance as a hedge is a Loan and advance role where the Loan and advance instrument acts as a non-derivative hedge.
Notes
Number Of Columns7
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
4INSTRMNT_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
5ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
6ACCNTNG_HDG_INDCTRYString (1) DOMAccounting hedge indicator
7TYP_HDGYString (2) DOMType of hedge
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
4INSTRMNT_IDAn identifier applied by the reporting agent to uniquely identify each instrument under a single contract. Each instrument must have one instrument identifier. This value will not change over time and cannot be used as the instrument identifier for any other instrument under the same contract.
6ACCNTNG_HDG_INDCTRAn indicator specifying if the hedge is considered an accounting hedge or not.
7TYP_HDGType of hedge applicable under the relevant accounting standard.
Indexes
Index NameStateFunctionalSpatialExpressionColumn NameSort
Order
EQT_INSTRMNT_NT_SCRT_HDG_PKPKDT_RFRNCASC
RPRTNG_AGNT_IDASC

INSTRMNT_IDASC
ACCNTNG_STNDRDASC
Constraints
TypeColumn / Constraint NameDetails
Column LevelACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVL
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Solo consolidation level
2Group consolidation level
ACCNTNG_STNDRD
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1National GAAP not consistent with IFRS
2IFRS
3National GAAP consistent with IFRS
TYP_HDG
Values List
ValueDescription
1Fair value hedge: Hedging relationship as defined in IFRS 9.6.5.2 (a)
11Hedges other than cash flow hedge and hedge of net investment in a foreign operation: Economic hedge
12Economic hedge. With use of fair value option
13Economic hedge. Other
2Cash flow hedge: Hedging relationship as defined in IFRS 9.6.5.2 (b)
3Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation: Hedging relationship as defined in IFRS 9.6.5.2 (c)
4Portfolio fair value hedges of interest rate risk: Hedging relationship as defined in IAS39.AG 114-132
5Portfolio cash flow hedges of interest rate risk: Hedging relationship as defined in IAS39.AG 114-132
6Cost-price hedge: Hedging relationship as defined in Reg. 680/2014, Annex V, part 2.114. This hedging relationship is applicable only under nGAAP based on BAD
7Other than Fair value hedge, Cash flow hedge, Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation, Portfolio fair value hedges of interest rate risk, Portfolio cash flow hedges of interest rate risk, Cost-price hedge: Other applicable hedging relationship for nGAAP based on BAD reporters

NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1SCRTSTN_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
2DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
6SLLR_ENTTY_RL_TYPThe seller role.
7SLLR_PRTY_IDThe party identifier of the involved seller.
8BYR_ENTTY_RL_TYPThe buyer party role.
9BYR_PRTY_IDThe party identifier of the involved buyer.
10EXCHNG_TRDBL_DRVTV_SCRTY_IDThe security identifier of the exchange tradable derivative.

Table NameEXCHNG_TRDBL_DRVTV_PSTN
Functional NameExchange tradable derivative position
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionAn Exchange tradable derivative position is a Security or Exchange tradable derivative position with an Exchange tradable derivative.
Notes
Number Of Columns13
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1EXCHNG_TRDBL_DRVTV_SCRTY_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
5ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
6BYR_ENTTY_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
7SLLR_ENTTY_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
8SLLR_PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
9BYR_PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
10HLD_SL_INDCTRYString (1) DOMHeld for sale indicator (Input Layer)
11NTNL_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
12SCRTY_EXCHNG_TRDBL_DRVTV_PSTN_TYPYString (1) DOMSecurity or Exchange tradable derivative position type
13TYP_RSKYString (1) DOMType of risk (Input Layer)
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1EXCHNG_TRDBL_DRVTV_SCRTY_IDThe security identifier of the exchange tradable derivative.
2DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
6BYR_ENTTY_RL_TYPThe buyer party role.
7SLLR_ENTTY_RL_TYPThe seller role.
8SLLR_PRTY_IDThe security identifier of the exchange tradable derivative.
9BYR_PRTY_IDThe security identifier of the exchange tradable derivative.
10HLD_SL_INDCTRHeld for sale  indicates the Non-current assets and instruments in disposal groups classified as held for sale in accordance with IFRS5. Is not applicable under national GAAP based on BAD.
11NTNL_AMNTThe notional amount on a financial instrument is the nominal or face amount that is used to calculate payments made on that instrument.
12SCRTY_EXCHNG_TRDBL_DRVTV_PSTN_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between security positions and tradable derivative positions.
13TYP_RSKType of financial risk Indicates the type of risk arising from exposures or transactions (e.g. credit risk or market risk) for the Exchange tradable derivative.

Values List
ValueDescription
3Exchange tradable derivative position

TYP_RSK
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not Applicable
1Interest rate risk: Type of risk in accordance with Reg. 680/2014, Annex V, part 2.129 (a)
2Equity risk: Type of risk in accordance with Reg. 680/2014, Annex V, part 2.129 (b)
3Foreign-exchange and gold risk: Type of risk in accordance with Reg. 680/2014, Annex V, part 2.129 (c)
4Credit risk: Type of risk in accordance with Reg. 680/2014, Annex V, part 2.129 (d)
5Commodities risk: Type of risk in accordance with Reg. 680/2014, Annex V, part 2.129 (e)
6Risk other than Interest rate risk, Equity risk, Foreign-exchange and gold risk, Credit risk, Commodities risk: Type of risk in accordance with Reg. 680/2014, Annex V, part 2.129 (f)
