Table NameLNG_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_SCRTY_PSTN_PRTCTN_ARRNGMNT_RCVD_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameLong balance sheet recognised security position protection arrangement received assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionLong balance sheet recognised security position Protection arrangement received assignment is the combination of Long balance sheet recognised security position Protection arrangement received and Protection arrangement received stating which Long balance sheet recognised security position is protected by which Protection arrangement.
Notes
Number Of Columns13
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
2PRTCTN_ARRNGMNT_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3PRTCTN_ARRNGMNT_RL_TYPPFYString (1) DOMProtection arrangement role type (Input layer)
4DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
5RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
7INVSTR_PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
8INVSTR_ENTTY_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
9SCRTY_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
10SCRTY_PSTN_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_TYPPFYStringDOMSecurity position Balance sheet recognised type (Input Layer)
11LNG_SHRT_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_SCRTY_PSTN_TYPPFYStringDOMLong/Short balance sheet recognised security position type (Input Layer)
12ALLCTD_UNSD_CLLTRL_VLYDECIMALDOMReal numbers with 2 decimals
13PRTCTN_ALLCTD_VLYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
2PRTCTN_ARRNGMNT_IDAn identifier to univocally identify each protection arragement.
3PRTCTN_ARRNGMNT_RL_TYPProtection arrangement role type distinguishes the Protection arrangement role according to their nature.
4DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
5RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
6ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
7INVSTR_PRTY_IDAn identifier that uniquely identifies a party.
8INVSTR_ENTTY_RL_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between different roles a party may act in. Examples are debtor, creditor, servicer.
9SCRTY_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
12ALLCTD_UNSD_CLLTRL_VLAllocated unused collateral value is an amount that expresses the protection value that is not used for risk mitigation and, for FINREP reporting purposes is allocated to a specific Loan and advance, which is the Long non-negotiable security position.
13PRTCTN_ALLCTD_VLProtection allocated value is the maximum amount of the protection value, via the Protection arrangement, that can be considered as credit protection for the Long security position. For protections that is eligible under Regulation (EU) No 575/2013, this value should be reported in accordance with Part 2 of Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.

Table NameLNG_NN_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_SCRTY_PSTN_CLLTRL_RCVD_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameLong non-balance sheet recognised security position collateral received assigment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionLong non-balance sheet recognised security position collateral received assigment is the combination of Long non- balance sheet recognised security position and collateral received stating which Long non- balance sheet recognised security position is protected by which Collateral.
Notes
Number Of Columns12
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
4ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5CLLTRL_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6CLLTRL_RL_TYPPFYString (1) DOMCollateral role type (Input layer)
7INVSTR_PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
8INVSTR_ENTTY_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
9SCRTY_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
10SCRTY_PSTN_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_TYPPFYStringDOMSecurity position Balance sheet recognised type (Input Layer)
11ALLCTD_UNSD_CLLTRL_VLYDECIMALDOMReal numbers with 2 decimals
12PRTCTN_ALLCTD_VLYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5CLLTRL_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each collateral.
6CLLTRL_RL_TYPCollateral role type distiguishes the Collateral role according to the role the Collateral acts in.
7INVSTR_PRTY_IDAn identifier that uniquely identifies a party.
8INVSTR_ENTTY_RL_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between different roles a party may act in. Examples are debtor, creditor, servicer.
9SCRTY_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
11ALLCTD_UNSD_CLLTRL_VLAllocated unused collateral value is an amount that expresses the protection value that is not used for risk mitigation and, for FINREP reporting purposes is allocated to a specific Loan and advance, which is the Long non-negotiable security position.
12PRTCTN_ALLCTD_VLProtection allocated value is the maximum amount of the protection value, that can be considered as credit protection for the Long non-negotiable security position. For protections that is eligible under Regulation (EU) No 575/2013, this value should be reported in accordance with Part 2 of Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.

Table NameLNG_NN_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_SCRTY_PSTN_PRTCTN_ARRNGMNT_RCVD_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameLong non-balance sheet recognised security position protection arrangement received assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionLong non-balance sheet recognised security position Protection arrangement received assignment is the combination of Long non-balance sheet recognised security position Protection arrangement received and Protection arrangement received stating which Long non-balance sheet recognised security position is protected by which Protection arrangement.
Notes
Number Of Columns12
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
4ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5PRTCTN_ARRNGMNT_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6PRTCTN_ARRNGMNT_RL_TYPPFYString (1) DOMProtection arrangement role type (Input layer)
7INVSTR_PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
8INVSTR_ENTTY_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
9SCRTY_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
10SCRTY_PSTN_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_TYPPFYStringDOMSecurity position Balance sheet recognised type (Input Layer)
11ALLCTD_UNSD_CLLTRL_VLYDECIMALDOMReal numbers with 2 decimals
12PRTCTN_ALLCTD_VLYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5PRTCTN_ARRNGMNT_IDAn identifier to univocally identify each protection arragement.
6PRTCTN_ARRNGMNT_RL_TYPProtection arrangement role type distinguishes the Protection arrangement role according to their nature.
7INVSTR_PRTY_IDAn identifier that uniquely identifies a party.
8INVSTR_ENTTY_RL_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between different roles a party may act in. Examples are debtor, creditor, servicer.
9SCRTY_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
11ALLCTD_UNSD_CLLTRL_VLAllocated unused collateral value is an amount that expresses the protection value that is not used for risk mitigation and, for FINREP reporting purposes is allocated to a specific Loan and advance, which is the Long non-negotiable security position.
12PRTCTN_ALLCTD_VLProtection allocated value is the maximum amount of the protection value, via the Protection arrangement, that can be considered as credit protection for the Long security position. For protections that is eligible under Regulation (EU) No 575/2013, this value should be reported in accordance with Part 2 of Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.

Table NameLNG_SHRT_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_SCRTY_PSTN
Functional NameLong/Short balance sheet recognised security position
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA Long/Short balance sheet recognised security position is a balance sheet recognised security position that is either long or short.

Notes
Number Of Columns17
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
3INVSTR_PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
4INVSTR_ENTTY_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
5DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
6ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
7SCRTY_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
8LNG_SHRT_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_SCRTY_PSTN_TYPPYStringDOMLong/Short balance sheet recognised security position type (Input Layer)
9SCRTY_PSTN_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_TYPPFYStringDOMSecurity position Balance sheet recognised type (Input Layer)
10FV_HRRCHYYString (1) DOMFair value hierarchy (Input Layer)
11HLD_SL_INDCTRYString (1) DOMHeld for sale indicator (Input Layer)
12SCRTY_PSTN_RL_TYPYString (1) DOMSecurity position role type
13ACCMLTD_CHNGS_FVDECIMAL (2)DOMPositive and negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
14CRRYNG_AMNTDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
15FVDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
16FV_CHNGDECIMAL (2)DOMPositive and negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
17HRCTS_TRDNG_PSTN_FVDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
2ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
3INVSTR_PRTY_IDAn identifier that uniquely identifies a party.
4INVSTR_ENTTY_RL_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between different roles a party may act in. Examples are debtor, creditor, servicer.
5DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
7SCRTY_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
10FV_HRRCHYLevel of fair value of a financial asset or liability according to the hierarchy defined in IFRS 13. Applicable to national GAAP based on BAD only if the allocation of instruments is measured at fair value according to different levels.
11HLD_SL_INDCTRHeld for sale  indicates the Non-current assets and instruments in disposal groups classified as held for sale in accordance with IFRS5. Is not applicable under national GAAP based on BAD.
12SCRTY_PSTN_RL_TYPSecurity position role type distinguishes the Security position according to the role it can have, asset, liability, undetermined. This can be derived from the type of security position.

Nota Bene: there can be only one role for the Security position at any given moment in time.
13ACCMLTD_CHNGS_FVAmount of gains and losses from re-measurement of the asset accumulated from the initial recognition to the reference date.
14CRRYNG_AMNTThe carrying amount in accordance with Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.
15FVFair value as defined in IFRS 13.9.
16FV_CHNGFair value changes in the period and before taxes.
17HRCTS_TRDNG_PSTN_FVHaircut for trading position valued at fair value. 
According to Annex V (5.29):
Where applicable under national GAAP based on BAD, ‘Haircuts for trading positions valued at fair value’ shall be reported. The haircuts decrease the value of trading assets and increase the value of trading liabilities.

1National GAAP not consistent with IFRS
2IFRS
3National GAAP consistent with IFRS
LNG_SHRT_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_SCRTY_PSTN_TYP
Values List
ValueDescription
3Long balance sheet recognised security position International Financial Reporting Standard (IFRS)
4Long balance sheet recognised security position national general accepted accounting principles (nGAAP)
5Short balance sheet recognised security position International Financial Reporting Standard (IFRS)
6Short balance sheet recognised security position national general accepted accounting principles (nGAAP)
SCRTY_PSTN_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_TYP
Values List
ValueDescription
1Balance sheet recognised security position
3Non-balance sheet recognised debt security position
4Non-balance sheet recognised equity or fund security position
FV_HRRCHY
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Level 1: Level 1 inputs used for the measurement of fair value. Level 1 inputs are quoted prices in active markets for identical assets or liabilities that the entity can access at the measurement date
2Level 2: Level 2 inputs used for the measurment of fair value. Level 2 inputs are inputs other than quoted prices included within Level 1 that are observable for the asset or liability, either directly or indirectly
3Level 3: Level 3 inputs used for the measurment of fair value. Level 3 inputs are unobservable inputs for the asset or liability
HLD_SL_INDCTR
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Held for sale: The member indicates that the instrument is held for sale
2Not held for sale: The member indicates that the instrument is not held for sale
SCRTY_PSTN_RL_TYP
Values List
ValueDescription
1Asset security position
2Liability security position
3Undetermined asset or liability security position

Table NameLNG_SHRT_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_SCRTY_PSTN_HDG
Functional NameLong/Short balance sheet recognised security position as a hedge
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionLong/Short balance sheet recognised security position as a hedge is the role in which the Security position role acts as a hedge.
Notes
Number Of Columns11
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
3INVSTR_PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
4INVSTR_ENTTY_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
5DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
6ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
7SCRTY_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
8SCRTY_PSTN_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_TYPPFYStringDOMSecurity position Balance sheet recognised type (Input Layer)
9LNG_SHRT_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_SCRTY_PSTN_TYPPFYStringDOMLong/Short balance sheet recognised security position type (Input Layer)
10ACCNTNG_HDG_INDCTRYString (1) DOMAccounting hedge indicator
11TYP_HDGYString (2) DOMType of hedge
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
2ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
3INVSTR_PRTY_IDAn identifier that uniquely identifies a party.
4INVSTR_ENTTY_RL_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between different roles a party may act in. Examples are debtor, creditor, servicer.
5DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
7SCRTY_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
10ACCNTNG_HDG_INDCTRAn indicator specifying if the hedge is considered an accounting hedge or not.
11TYP_HDGType of hedge applicable under the relevant accounting standard.

ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1National GAAP not consistent with IFRS
2IFRS
3National GAAP consistent with IFRS
SCRTY_PSTN_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_TYP
Values List
ValueDescription
1Balance sheet recognised security position
3Non-balance sheet recognised debt security position
4Non-balance sheet recognised equity or fund security position
LNG_SHRT_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_SCRTY_PSTN_TYP
Values List
ValueDescription
3Long balance sheet recognised security position International Financial Reporting Standard (IFRS)
4Long balance sheet recognised security position national general accepted accounting principles (nGAAP)
5Short balance sheet recognised security position International Financial Reporting Standard (IFRS)
6Short balance sheet recognised security position national general accepted accounting principles (nGAAP)
ACCNTNG_HDG_INDCTR
Values List
ValueDescription
1Accounting hedge
TYP_HDG
Values List
ValueDescription
1Fair value hedge: Hedging relationship as defined in IFRS 9.6.5.2 (a)
11Hedges other than cash flow hedge and hedge of net investment in a foreign operation: Economic hedge
12Economic hedge. With use of fair value option
13Economic hedge. Other
2Cash flow hedge: Hedging relationship as defined in IFRS 9.6.5.2 (b)
3Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation: Hedging relationship as defined in IFRS 9.6.5.2 (c)
4Portfolio fair value hedges of interest rate risk: Hedging relationship as defined in IAS39.AG 114-132
5Portfolio cash flow hedges of interest rate risk: Hedging relationship as defined in IAS39.AG 114-132
6Cost-price hedge: Hedging relationship as defined in Reg. 680/2014, Annex V, part 2.114. This hedging relationship is applicable only under nGAAP based on BAD
7Other than Fair value hedge, Cash flow hedge, Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation, Portfolio fair value hedges of interest rate risk, Portfolio cash flow hedges of interest rate risk, Cost-price hedge: Other applicable hedging relationship for nGAAP based on BAD reporters

Table NameLNKD_ENTRPRS_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameLinked enterprise assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA Linked enterprise is a combination of a Central bank and private sector company and a Central bank and private sector company that indicates which Central bank and private sector company is linked to which Central bank and private sector company in the sense of Commission Recommendation 2003/361/EC.
Notes
Number Of Columns7
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3CNTR_BNK_PRVT_SCTR_CMPNY_PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
5ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
6LNKD_ENTRPRS_ENTTY_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
7LNKD_ENTRPRS_PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3CNTR_BNK_PRVT_SCTR_CMPNY_PRTY_IDThe party identifier of the involved linked enterprise.
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
6LNKD_ENTRPRS_ENTTY_RL_TYPLinked enterprise Party role type is the role type identifying the central bank and private sector company role type as Linked enterprise in the Linked enterprise assignment.
7LNKD_ENTRPRS_PRTY_IDLinked enterprise Party identifier identifies the party that has the Central bank and private sector company role type of Linked enterprise in the Linked enterprise assignment.

Table NameLN_AND_ADVNC_HDG
Functional NameLoan and advance as a hedge
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionLoan and advance as a hedge is a Loan and advance role where the Loan  and advance instrument acts as a non-derivative hedge.
Notes
Number Of Columns7
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
4INSTRMNT_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
5ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
6ACCNTNG_HDG_INDCTRYString (1) DOMAccounting hedge indicator
7TYP_HDGYString (2) DOMType of hedge
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
4INSTRMNT_IDAn identifier applied by the reporting agent to uniquely identify each instrument under a single contract. Each instrument must have one instrument identifier. This value will not change over time and cannot be used as the instrument identifier for any other instrument under the same contract.
6ACCNTNG_HDG_INDCTRAn indicator specifying if the hedge is considered an accounting hedge or not.
7TYP_HDGType of hedge applicable under the relevant accounting standard.

Table NameNN_FNNCL_ASST
Functional NameNon-financial asset
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA Non-financial asset is an Asset that is not a Financial asset.
Notes
Number Of Columns11
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1NN_FNNCL_ASST_IDPYString (120)  - AI - IDDOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2HLD_SL_INDCTRPYString (1) DOMHeld for sale indicator (Input Layer)
3DT_RFRNCPYDateDOMAll possible dates
4RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
5ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
6ACCNTNG_STNDRDPYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
7CRRYNG_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
8MSRMNT_MTHDYStringDOMMeasurement method (Input Layer)
9NN_FNNCL_ASST_TYPYString (4) DOMType of non-financial asset (Input Layer)
10SBJCT_OPRTNG_LS_INDCTRYString (1) DOMSubject to operating lease Indicator (Input Layer)
11SFTWR_ASST_INDCTRYString (1) DOMSoftware assets indicator (Input Layer)
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
2HLD_SL_INDCTRHeld for sale  indicates the Non-current assets and instruments in disposal groups classified as held for sale in accordance with IFRS5. Is not applicable under national GAAP based on BAD.
3DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
4RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
5ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
7CRRYNG_AMNTThe carrying amount in accordance with Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.
8MSRMNT_MTHDMeasurement method identifies the type of measurement method according to IAS (See IAS 16.30, 16.31 and IAS 40.33-55, 76). It distinguishes into their cost or revaluation model. 
10SBJCT_OPRTNG_LS_INDCTRAn indicator to specify if an object is subject to operating lease or not.
11SFTWR_ASST_INDCTRTime elapsed since initial recognition band classifies time elapsed since initial recognition in the balance sheet into bands used for FINREP reporting.

Table NameNTRL_PRSN_KY_MNGMNT_PRSNLL_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameNatural person Key management personnel assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionNatural person Key management personnel assignment is the combination of Key management personnel and Natural person that indicates which Natural person directly or indirectly influences the Key management personnel.

 If an individual is related to the entity based on the criteria stated above, all their close family members are also considered related parties. Close family members are defined as family members who are likely to influence, or be influenced by, that individual in their interactions with the entity (IAS 24.9). (via https://ifrscommunity.com/knowledge-base/ias-24-related-party-disclosures/#definition-of-a-related-party)
Notes
Number Of Columns7
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear

Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1KY_MNGMNT_PRSNNL_PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
4NTRL_PRSN_GRP_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
5ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
6ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)

Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1KY_MNGMNT_PRSNNL_PRTY_IDKey management personnel Party identifier is an identifier that uniquely identifies a Key management personnel.
2DT_RFRNCKey management personnel Party reference date is the date the data of the Key management personnel  refers to.
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDNatural person group role reporting agent identifier identifies the reporting agent that reports on the Natural person group role.
4NTRL_PRSN_GRP_RL_TYPNatural person group role type indicates the role that the natural person has for the group.
5ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
7NTRL_PRSN_PRTY_IDKey management personnel Party identifier is an identifier that uniquely identifies a Key management personnel.

Table NameOTC_DRVTV_HDG
Functional NameOver the counter (OTC) Derivative as a hedge
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionAn Over the counter (OTC) Derivative as a hedge is an Over the counter (OTC) Derivative role where the Over the counter (OTC) Derivative instrument acts as a hedge.
Notes
Number Of Columns9
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
4INSTRMNT_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
5ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
6ACCNTNG_HDG_INDCTRYString (1) DOMAccounting hedge indicator
7CST_BSD_MTHD_LCM_INDCTRYString (1) DOMHedge accounting - At cost based method or Lower of cost or market (LOCOM) indicator (Input layer)
8OTC_DRVTV_HDG_ACCNTNG_STNDRD_TYPYString (1) DOMOver the counter (OTC) Derivative hedge accounting standard type
9TYP_HDGYString (2) DOMType of hedge
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
4INSTRMNT_IDAn identifier applied by the reporting agent to uniquely identify each instrument under a single contract. Each instrument must have one instrument identifier. This value will not change over time and cannot be used as the instrument identifier for any other instrument under the same contract.
6ACCNTNG_HDG_INDCTRAn indicator specifying if the hedge is considered an accounting hedge or not.
7CST_BSD_MTHD_LCM_INDCTRAt cost based method or Lower of costs or market (LOCOM) indicator distinguishes the used accounting portfolio for national General Accepted Accounting Principles (nGAAP) between those that use the At cost based method or Lower of costs or market (LOCOM), and those that do not use At cost based method or Lower of costs or carket (LOCOM).
8OTC_DRVTV_HDG_ACCNTNG_STNDRD_TYPOver the counter (OTC) Derivative hedge accounting standard type distinguishes the Over the counter (OTC) Derivative as a hedge according to the applied accounting standard.
9TYP_HDGType of hedge applicable under the relevant accounting standard.
Indexes
Index NameStateFunctionalSpatialExpressionColumn NameSort
Order
OTC_DRVTV_HDG_PKPKDT_RFRNCASC

OTC_DRVTV_HDG_ACCNTNG_STNDRD_TYP
Values List
ValueDescription
1Over the counter (OTC) Derivative as a hedge according to International Financial Reporting Standard (IFRS)
2Over the counter (OTC) Derivative as a hedge according to national general accepted accounting principles (nGAAP)
TYP_HDG
Values List
ValueDescription
1Fair value hedge: Hedging relationship as defined in IFRS 9.6.5.2 (a)
11Hedges other than cash flow hedge and hedge of net investment in a foreign operation: Economic hedge
12Economic hedge. With use of fair value option
13Economic hedge. Other
2Cash flow hedge: Hedging relationship as defined in IFRS 9.6.5.2 (b)
3Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation: Hedging relationship as defined in IFRS 9.6.5.2 (c)
4Portfolio fair value hedges of interest rate risk: Hedging relationship as defined in IAS39.AG 114-132
5Portfolio cash flow hedges of interest rate risk: Hedging relationship as defined in IAS39.AG 114-132
6Cost-price hedge: Hedging relationship as defined in Reg. 680/2014, Annex V, part 2.114. This hedging relationship is applicable only under nGAAP based on BAD
7Other than Fair value hedge, Cash flow hedge, Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation, Portfolio fair value hedges of interest rate risk, Portfolio cash flow hedges of interest rate risk, Cost-price hedge: Other applicable hedging relationship for nGAAP based on BAD reporters

Table NameOTC_DRVTV_INSTRMNT_SNTHTC_SCRTSTN_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameOver the counter (OTC) Derivative instrument Synthetic securitisation assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionOver the counter (OTC) Derivative instrument Synthetic securitisation assignment is the combination of Over the counter (OTC) Derivative instrument and Synthetic securitisation assignment that indicates which Over the counter (OTC) Derivative instrument is assigned to which Synthetic securitisation assignment.
Notes
Number Of Columns6
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear

Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1SCRTSTN_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2INSTRMNT_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
4RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore

6ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1SCRTSTN_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
2INSTRMNT_IDAn identifier applied by the reporting agent to uniquely identify each instrument under a single contract. Each instrument must have one instrument identifier. This value will not change over time and cannot be used as the instrument identifier for any other instrument under the same contract.
3DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
4RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
5ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Table NameOTHR_PRTY_ID
Functional NameOther party identifier
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionOther party identifier is a code (different to the attribute Party identifier) of a Party that identifies the party in systems outside of the bank. It is a combination of a Party and a Party  identifier type.
Notes
Number Of Columns8
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
4PRTY_CD_TYPPFYString (1) DOMParty code type
5ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
6ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
7PRTY_ID_TYPPYString (2) DOMExternal party identifier type
8OTHR_PRTY_CDYString (250) DOMString-ASCII up to 250 characters
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1PRTY_IDAn identifier that uniquely identifies a party.
2DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
4PRTY_CD_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between different types of party codes.
5ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
7PRTY_ID_TYPParty identifier type classifies the Other party code according to its nature.
8OTHR_PRTY_CDOther party code is an identifier that identifies the party externally to the bank.

Table NamePRPRTY_PLNT_EQPMNT_TKN_PSSSSN
Functional NameProperty, plant and equipment taken into possession
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionProperty, plant and equipment taken into possession is Property, plant and equipment that was not pledged by the debtor as collateral, but was obtained in exchange for the cancellation of debt, whether on a voluntary basis or as part of legal proceedings.
Notes
Number Of Columns17
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1TM_SNC_INTL_RCGNTNPYString (2) DOMTime elapsed since initial recognition band
2PRPRTY_PLNT_EQPMNT_TKN_PSSSSN_DRNG_PRD_INDCTRPYString (1) DOMProperty, plant and equipment taken into possession period indicator
3DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
4RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
5ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
6ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
7SFTWR_ASST_INDCTRPYString (1) DOMSoftware assets indicator
8HLD_SL_INDCTRPFYString (1) DOMHeld for sale indicator (Input Layer)
9MSRMNT_MTHDPYString (1) DOMMeasurement method
10SBJCT_OPRTNG_LS_INDCTRPYString (1) DOMSubject to operating lease indicator
11NN_FNNCL_ASST_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
12ACCMLTD_CHNG_NGTVYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
13ACCMLTD_CHNGS_FV_EXPSR_CRYDECIMAL (2)DOMPositive and negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
14DRCGNSD_EXPSR_ACCMLTD_IMPRMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
15GCA_EXPSR_DRCGNSD_EXCHNG_CLLTRLYDECIMAL (2)DOMPositive and negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
16GRSS_CRRYNG_AMNTYDECIMAL (2)DOMPositive and negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
17GRSS_CRRYNG_AMNT_INTL_RCGNTNYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1TM_SNC_INTL_RCGNTNTime elapsed since initial recognition band classifies time elapsed since initial recognition in the balance sheet into bands used for FINREP reporting.
3DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
4RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
5ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
7SFTWR_ASST_INDCTRTime elapsed since initial recognition band classifies time elapsed since initial recognition in the balance sheet into bands used for FINREP reporting.
8HLD_SL_INDCTRHeld for sale  indicates the Non-current assets and instruments in disposal groups classified as held for sale in accordance with IFRS5. Is not applicable under national GAAP based on BAD.
9MSRMNT_MTHDMeasurement method identifies the type of measurement method according to IAS (See IAS 16.30, 16.31 and IAS 40.33-55, 76). It distinguishes into their cost or revaluation model. 
10SBJCT_OPRTNG_LS_INDCTRAn indicator to specify if an object is subject to operating lease or not.
12ACCMLTD_CHNG_NGTVAccumulated negative changes shall be the difference, at the level of the individual collateral item, between the value at initial recognition of the collateral and the carrying amount at the reporting reference date, where that difference is negative. (FINREP Annex V)
13ACCMLTD_CHNGS_FV_EXPSR_CRAccumulated changes in fair value due to credit risk in accordance with Part 2.46 of Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014 of the exposure that is derecognised because of the Property, plant and equipment taken into possession.

Note: This amount must only be reported when it is negative.
14DRCGNSD_EXPSR_ACCMLTD_IMPRMNTAccumulated impairment is the amount of loss allowances that are held against or are allocated to the derecognised exposure on the reporting reference date for which the Property, plant and equipment taken into possession has been obtained.

This data attribute applies to assets subject to impairment under the applied accounting standard. Under IFRS, the accumulated impairment relates to the following
amounts:
(i) loss allowance at an amount equal to 12-month expected
credit losses;
(ii) loss allowance at an amount equal to lifetime expected
credit losses.
Under GAAP, the accumulated impairment relates to the following
amounts:
(i) loss allowance at an amount equal to general allowances;
(ii) loss allowance at an amount equal to specific allowances.
15GCA_EXPSR_DRCGNSD_EXCHNG_CLLTRLDerecognised exposure gross carrying amount is an amount, that is the gross carrying amount of exposures that are derecognised on the balance sheet in exchange for Property, plant and equipment taken possession.
16GRSS_CRRYNG_AMNTGross carrying amount is an amount,that is the gross carrying amount of the Propperty, plant and equipment taken into possession.
17GRSS_CRRYNG_AMNT_INTL_RCGNTNGross carrying amount at the point in time of the initial recognition in the balance sheet 
Indexes
Index NameStateFunctionalSpatialExpressionColumn NameSort
Order

2Not Subject to operating lease: The asset is not subject to operating lease

kind		Domain NameFormula

Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

6PRTCTN_ARRNGMNT_RL_TYPProtection arrangement role type distinguishes the Protection arrangement role according to their nature.
7AVLBL_ENCMBRNC_INDCTRAvailable for encumbrance indicator distinguishes the asset into being available for asset encumbrance and not being available for asset encumbrance.
8PRTCTN_ARRNGMNT_RS_INDCTRProtection arrangement reuse indicator distinguishes the Protection arrangement according to fact if it is reused as protection for something else, or if it is only used once.

Table NamePRTCTN_PRTCTN_PRVD_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameProtection Protection provider assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA Protection Protection provider assignment is the composition of a Protection arrangement and a Protection provider that indicates which Protection provider provides which Protection.
Notes
Number Of Columns8
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3PRTCTN_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
5ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
6ENTTY_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
7PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
8PRMRY_PRTCTN_PRVDR_INDCTRYString (1) DOMPrimary protection provider indicator
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3PRTCTN_IDAn identifier to univocally identify each protection arragement.
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
6ENTTY_RL_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between different roles a party may act in. Examples are debtor, creditor, servicer.
7PRTY_IDAn identifier to univocally identify each protection arragement.
8PRMRY_PRTCTN_PRVDR_INDCTRAn indicator specifying if the protection provider is the primary protection provider which will be used for AnaCredit reporting.

Table NamePRTNR_ENTRPRS_ASSGNMNT
Functional NamePartner enterprise assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionPartner enterprise assignment is the combination of a Central bank and private sector company and a Parent enterprise that indicates which Central bank and private sector company is a partner to which Central bank and private sector company in the sense of Commission Recommendation 2003/361/EC.
Notes
Number Of Columns8
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3CNTR_BNK_PRVT_SCTR_CMPNY_PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
5ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
6OTHR_ORGNSTN_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
7PRTNR_ENTRPRS_PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
8PRCNTG_INTRST_CPTL_VTNG_RGHTYDECIMALDOMReal numbers from 0 to 1 with 6 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3CNTR_BNK_PRVT_SCTR_CMPNY_PRTY_IDThe party identifier of the involved partner enterprise.
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
6OTHR_ORGNSTN_RL_TYPPartner enterprise Party role type is the role type identifying the central bank and private sector company role type as Partner enterprise in the Partner enterprise assignment.
7PRTNR_ENTRPRS_PRTY_IDPartner enterprise Party identifier identifies the party that has the Central bank and private sector company role type of Partner enterprise in the Partner enterprise assignment.
8PRCNTG_INTRST_CPTL_VTNG_RGHTPercentage interest in the capital or voting rights (whichever is greater).

Table NamePRTY
Functional NameParty risk data
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA Party is an entity of interest.
Notes
Number Of Columns47
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
4ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5PRTY_IDPYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6ULTMT_PRNT_UNDRT_PRTY_IDFString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7INSTTTNL_UNT_GRP_IDFString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
8ORGNSTN_PRTY_IDFString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
9AREA_ENTTY_LCTD_SHSYString (5) DOMArea where the entity is located
10CNTRY_CDYString (2) DOMISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code of the country (Input Layer)
11DFLT_STTSYString (2) DOMDefault status type
12DT_DFLT_STTSYDateDOMAll possible dates
13ECNMC_ACTVTYYString (5) DOMNACE levels 2 to 4 plus not applicable (staging)
14ECNMC_ACTVTY_V2YString (5) DOMEconomic Activity V2
15ENTRPRS_INDCTRYString (1) DOMEnterprise indicator (Input Layer)
16ENTRPRS_SZYString (1) DOMEnterprise size
17DT_ENTRPRS_SZYDateDOMAll possible dates
18GVRND_CNTRY_CDYString (2) DOMISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code of the country
19INSTTTNL_SCTRYString (8) DOMInstitutional sectors
20INSTTTNL_SCTR_CNTRLYString (1) DOMControlled by national or foreign bodies (Input Layer)
21INTRNTNL_ORGNSTN_CDYString (3) DOMPseudo-ISO code for international organisations of the Eurostat’s ‘Balance of Payments Vademecum’ (Input Layer)
22LDNG_BRNCH_ANCRDT_RPRTNG_INDCTRYString (2) DOMLeading branch indicator (Input Layer)
23LGL_FRMYString (9) DOMLegal form (Input Layer)
24LGL_PRCDNG_STTSYString (1) DOMLegal proceedings status (Input Layer)
25LSTD_CNTRL_BNK_PRVT_SCTR_CMPNY_INDCTRYStringDOMListed central bank and private sector company indicator (Input Layer)
26MLTLTRL_DVLPMNT_BNK_INDCTRYString (1) DOMMultilateral development bank indicator (Input Layer)
27MRKT_CPTLSTN_INDCTRYString (1) DOMMarket Capitalisation indicator (Input Layer)
28ORGNSTN_TYP_BY_PRCDNG_STTSYString (2) DOMOrganisation type by legal proceeding status (Input Layer)
29PLLNG_EFFCT_INDCTRYString (1) DOMPulling effect indicator (Input Layer)
30PRFRMNG_STTSYString (2) DOMPerforming status
31PRFRMNG_STTS_RSNYString (1) DOMPerforming status reason
32PRTY_TYPYString (6) DOMType of Party (Input Layer)
33PRTY_TYP_ADDRSSYString (3) DOMParty type by address (Input Layer)
34TRRTRL_UNTYString (5) DOMNUTS 3 codes (Input Layer)
35TYP_ECNMYYString (1) DOMType of economy (Input Layer)
36ANNL_TRNVRDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
37BLNC_SHT_TTLDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
38CTYString (250) DOMString-ASCII up to 250 characters
39DT_INTTN_LGL_PRCDNGSDateDOMAll possible dates
40FRST_NMString (50) DOMString up to 50 characters
41LEIString (20) DOMString with 18 characters (capital letters or digits) followed by 2 digits
42LST_NMString (50) DOMString up to 50 characters
43NM_ENTTYString (250) DOMString-ASCII up to 250 characters
44NMBR_EMPLYSREALDOMNon-negative real numbers with 0 decimals
45PD_ANCRDTDECIMALDOMReal numbers from 0 to 1 with 6 decimals
46PSTL_CDString (255) DOMString up to 255 characters - latin extended
47STRTString (250) DOMString-ASCII up to 250 characters
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5PRTY_IDAn identifier that uniquely identifies a party.
6ULTMT_PRNT_UNDRT_PRTY_IDThe party identifier of the ultimate parent undertaking accoring to Regulation (EU) 867/2016, defined as the "Counterparty identifier for the legal entity which is the ultimate parent undertaking of the counterparty. This ultimate parent undertaking has no parent undertaking. If the counterparty has no parent undertaking, the counterparty identifier for the counterparty itself is to be reported. Parent undertaking has the same meaning as defined in Article 4(1)(15)(a) of Regulation (EU) No 575/2013.".
7INSTTTNL_UNT_GRP_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each group.
8ORGNSTN_PRTY_IDThe party identifier of the involved organisation.
9AREA_ENTTY_LCTD_SHSArea where the entity is located
10CNTRY_CDThe country code according to ISO3166.
11DFLT_STTSA discriminator to distinguish between default because unlikely to pay, 90/180 days past due or both according to Regulation (EU) 575/2013, Article 178.
12DT_DFLT_STTSThe date the default status refers to.
13ECNMC_ACTVTYClassification of counterparties according to their economic activities, in accordance with the NACE revision 2 statistical classification as laid down in Regulation (EC) No 1893/2006 of the European Parliament and of the Council.
14ECNMC_ACTVTY_V2Classification of counterparties according to their economic activities, in accordance with the NACE revision 2 statistical classification as laid down in Regulation (EC) No 1893/2006 of the European Parliament and of the Council.
15ENTRPRS_INDCTREnterprise indicator specifies if a party is an enterprise according to EU recommendation 2003/361.
16ENTRPRS_SZClassification of enterprises by size, in accordance with the Annex to Commission Recommendation 2003/361/EC.
17DT_ENTRPRS_SZThe date to which the value provided in the ‘enterprise size’ refers. This is the date of the latest data used to classify or review the classification of the enterprise.
18GVRND_CNTRY_CDGoverned Country code is a code that indicates the country that is governed by the Central Government.
19INSTTTNL_SCTRInstitutional sectors in accordance with Regulation (EU) No 549/2013, Regulation (EU) No 575/2013 and Regulation (EU) No 1075/2013 of the European Central Bank (ECB/2013/40)(1).
20INSTTTNL_SCTR_CNTRLControlled by national or foreign bodies specifies if a party is national private or foreign controlled according to European system of accounts (ESA) 2010.
22LDNG_BRNCH_ANCRDT_RPRTNG_INDCTRLeading branch indicator distinguishes Foreign branches into those that are considered leading branch for AnaCredit reporting and those that are Non-leading branches.
23LGL_FRMType of business entity as defined in the national legal system.
24LGL_PRCDNG_STTSCategories describing an entity's legal status in relation to its/his/her solvency based on the national legal framework.
25LSTD_CNTRL_BNK_PRVT_SCTR_CMPNY_INDCTRAn indicator specifying is a security is listed or not.
26MLTLTRL_DVLPMNT_BNK_INDCTRMultilateral development bank indicator specifies if the International organisation is a multilateral development bank or not.
27MRKT_CPTLSTN_INDCTRMarket capitalisation indicator classifies the Listed central bank and private sectory company as Large or Small market capitalisation. 

Market capitalisation, or "market cap", of the Listed central bank and private sector company is the sum of the market capitalisations based on the market value of the total outstanding shares issued by the same listed legal entity or a group of legal entities across all stock markets globally, where the total outstanding shares issued by the group of legal entities refer to cases where the listed entity is a parent company of a group of legal entities.
Large market cap is defined as a market capitalisation equal to or greater than USD 2 billion and small market cap is defined as a market capitalisation of less than USD 2 billion.
(https://www.bis.org/basel_framework/chapter/MAR/21.htm?inforce=20230101&published=20200327)
28ORGNSTN_TYP_BY_PRCDNG_STTSA discriminator to distinguish between organisations where legal proceedings are ongoing and those without legal proceedings.
29PLLNG_EFFCT_INDCTRAn indicator specifying if the pulling effect is applied.
30PRFRMNG_STTSPerforming status in accordance with Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.
31PRFRMNG_STTS_RSNThe reason for the choice of Performing status
33PRTY_TYP_ADDRSSA discriminator to distinguish parties between different types of addresses.
34TRRTRL_UNTThe region inside a country according to NUTS.
35TYP_ECNMYThe economy to which the organisation relates (e.g. advanced or emerging economy)
36ANNL_TRNVRAnnual sales volume net of all discounts and sales taxes in accordance with Recommendation 2003/361/EC. Equivalent to the concept of 'total annual sales' in Article 153(4) of Regulation (EU) No 575/2013.
37BLNC_SHT_TTLCarrying value of total assets in accordance with Regulation (EU) 549/2013.
38CTYThe city, town or village.
39DT_INTTN_LGL_PRCDNGSThe date on which the legal proceedings were initiated.
40FRST_NMThe first name.
41LEIReference code in line with the International Organization for Standardization’s (ISO) 17442 standard
42LST_NMThe last name.
43NM_ENTTYThe organisation name.
44NMBR_EMPLYSNumber of employees working for the counterparty, in accordance with Article 5 of the Annex to Recommendation 2003/361/EC.
45PD_ANCRDTProbability of default according to AnaCredit.
The counterparty's probability of default over one year, determined in accordance with Articles 160, 163, 179 and 180 of Regulation (EU) No 575/2013. 
46PSTL_CDEntity's postal code.
47STRTEntity's street address, including the street number.
Indexes

Order

ENTRPRS_INDCTR
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Enterprise
2Not enterprise
ENTRPRS_SZ
Values List
ValueDescription
1Large enterprise: Enterprise not qualifying as a micro, small or medium-sized enterprise (SME), in accordance with the Annex to Recommendation 2003/361/EC.
2Medium enterprise: Enterprise qualifying as an SME, but not as a small or micro enterprise, in accordance with the Annex to Recommendation 2003/361/EC.
3Small enterprise: Enterprise qualifying as a small enterprise, in accordance with the Annex to Recommendation 2003/361/EC.
4Micro enterprise: Enterprise qualifying as a micro enterprise in accordance with the Annex to Recommendation 2003/361/EC.

SPFUNDConventional legal form for Special funds: Special funds are unincorporated investment funds comprising investment portfolios owned by the group of participants and whose management is undertaken, in general, by other financial corporations. Such funds are institutional units that are separate from the managing financial corporation
LGL_PRCDNG_STTS
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1No legal actions taken: Legal actions have not been taken concerning the solvency or indebtedness of a counterparty.
2Under judicial administration, receivership or similar measures: Any proceeding involving the intervention of a judicial body or similar aimed at reaching a refinancing agreement among the creditors, with the exception of any bankruptcy or insolvency proceedings.
3Bankruptcy / insolvency: Collective and binding bankruptcy or insolvency proceedings under judicial control, which entail the partial or total divestment of a counterparty and the appointment of a liquidator.
4Other legal measures: Legal measures other than those already specified including bilateral legal measures between the reporting agent and the counterparty.
LSTD_CNTRL_BNK_PRVT_SCTR_CMPNY_INDCTR
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Listed central bank and private sector company
2Non-listed central bank and private sector company
MLTLTRL_DVLPMNT_BNK_INDCTR
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Multilateral development bank
2Not a Multilateral development bank
MRKT_CPTLSTN_INDCTR
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not Applicable
1Large Market Capitalisation
2Small Market Capitalisation
ORGNSTN_TYP_BY_PRCDNG_STTS
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
14Organisation without legal proceeding
15Organisation with legal proceeding
PLLNG_EFFCT_INDCTR
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Pulling effect
2Not pulling effect

Values List
ValueDescription
1Non-performing
11Performing
PRFRMNG_STTS_RSN
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Failed reclassification to performing at end of probation period
2Exited from Non-performing exposure (NPE) in the last 12 months

Table NamePRTY_CD
Functional NameParty code
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA party code is a code (different to the Party identifier) of a Party that identifies the party in systems outside of the bank. It is a combination of a Party and a Party code identifier.
Notes
Number Of Columns8
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
5ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
6PRTY_CD_TYPPYString (1) DOMParty code type
7LEIString (20) DOMString with 18 characters (capital letters or digits) followed by 2 digits
8RIAD_CDString (250) DOMString-ASCII up to 250 characters
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1PRTY_IDAn identifier that uniquely identifies a party.
2DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
6PRTY_CD_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between different types of party codes.
7LEILegal entity identifier, or LEI for short, is a string that uniquely identifies the Party according to the identifier assigned by the Global Legal Entity Identifier Foundation (GLEIF).
8RIAD_CDThe RIAD code, is a string that uniquely identifies the Party according to the identifier assigned by the Register of Institutions and Affiliates Database (RIAD).
Indexes
Index NameStateFunctionalSpatialExpressionColumn NameSort
Order
PRTY_CD_PKPKPRTY_IDASC
DT_RFRNCASC
RPRTNG_AGNT_IDASC
ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLASC
ACCNTNG_STNDRDASC
PRTY_CD_TYPASC
Constraints
TypeColumn / Constraint NameDetails
Column LevelACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVL
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Solo consolidation level
2Group consolidation level
ACCNTNG_STNDRD
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1National GAAP not consistent with IFRS
2IFRS
3National GAAP consistent with IFRS
PRTY_CD_TYP
Values List
ValueDescription
1Legal entity identifier party code
2Register of Institutions and Affiliates Database (RIAD) party code
3Other party code

Table NamePRTY_PRVS_PRD_DT
Functional NameParty previous period data
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA Party previous period data is information about a Party associated with the previous period. For example the Enterprise size that was calculated in the previous period.
Notes
Number Of Columns7
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1YRPYDate (4) DOMYear
2PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
4RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
5ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
6ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
7ENTRPRS_SZ_CLCLTDYString (1) DOMEnterprise size calculated (previous period)
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1YRThe year.
2PRTY_IDAn identifier that uniquely identifies a party.
3DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
4RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
5ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
7ENTRPRS_SZ_CLCLTDClassification of enterprises by size, in accordance with the Annex to Commission Recommendation 2003/361/EC.
Indexes
Index NameStateFunctionalSpatialExpressionColumn NameSort
Order
PRTY_PRVS_PRD_DT_PKPKYRASC
PRTY_IDASC
DT_RFRNCASC
RPRTNG_AGNT_IDASC
ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLASC
ACCNTNG_STNDRDASC
Constraints
TypeColumn / Constraint NameDetails
Column LevelACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVL
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Solo consolidation level
2Group consolidation level
ACCNTNG_STNDRD
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1National GAAP not consistent with IFRS
2IFRS
3National GAAP consistent with IFRS
ENTRPRS_SZ_CLCLTD
Values List
ValueDescription
2Medium enterprise: Enterprise qualifying as an SME, but not as a small or micro enterprise, in accordance with the Annex to Recommendation 2003/361/EC.
3Small enterprise: Enterprise qualifying as a small enterprise, in accordance with the Annex to Recommendation 2003/361/EC.
4Micro enterprise: Enterprise qualifying as a micro enterprise in accordance with the Annex to Recommendation 2003/361/EC.
6Large enterprise (from input data): Enterprise not qualifying as a micro, small or medium-sized enterprise (SME), in accordance with the Annex to Recommendation 2003/361/EC, as calculated from input data.
7Large enterprise because of absence of input data: Enterprise not qualifying as a micro, small or medium-sized enterprise (SME), in accordance with the Annex to Recommendation 2003/361/EC, as classified because of absence of input data.
Foreign Keys (referring to)
NameRefering ToMandatoryTransferableIn ArcColumnsReferred ColumnsDelete Rule

Table NameRPRCHS_TRNSCTN_GLD_GVN_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameRepurchase transaction gold (given) assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionRepurchase transaction gold assignment is the combination of a Repurchase transaction (being a repurchase agreement) and Gold that is given in the repurchase transaction.
Notes
Number Of Columns8
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
4ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
5HLD_SL_INDCTRPFYString (1) DOMHeld for sale indicator (Input Layer)
6NN_FNNCL_ASST_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7RPRCHS_TRNSCTN_IDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
8ENCMBRD_CRRYNG_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1RPRTNG_AGNT_IDAn identifier applied by the reporting agent to uniquely identify each instrument under a single contract. Each instrument must have one instrument identifier. This value will not change over time and cannot be used as the instrument identifier for any other instrument under the same contract.
2DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5HLD_SL_INDCTRHeld for sale  indicates the Non-current assets and instruments in disposal groups classified as held for sale in accordance with IFRS5. Is not applicable under national GAAP based on BAD.
7RPRCHS_TRNSCTN_IDAn identifier applied by the reporting agent to uniquely identify each instrument under a single contract. Each instrument must have one instrument identifier. This value will not change over time and cannot be used as the instrument identifier for any other instrument under the same contract.
8ENCMBRD_CRRYNG_AMNTThe carrying amount in accordance with Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.
Indexes
Index NameStateFunctionalSpatialExpressionColumn NameSort
Order
RPRCHS_TRNSCTN_GLD_GVN_ASSGNMNT_PKPKRPRTNG_AGNT_IDASC
DT_RFRNCASC
ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLASC
ACCNTNG_STNDRDASC
HLD_SL_INDCTRASC

ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Solo consolidation level
2Group consolidation level

Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Held for sale: The member indicates that the instrument is held for sale
2Not held for sale: The member indicates that the instrument is not held for sale
RPRCHS_TRNSCTN_ID
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1National GAAP not consistent with IFRS
2IFRS
3National GAAP consistent with IFRS

Table NameRPRCHS_TRNSCTN_LNG_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_SCRTY_PSTN_GVN_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameRepurchase transaction Long balance sheet recognised security position (given) assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionRepurchase transaction Long balance sheet recognised security position assignment is the combination of a Repurchase transaction (being a repurchase agreement) and  Long balance sheet recognised security position that is given in the Repurchase transaction.
Notes
Number Of Columns12
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1RPRCHS_TRNSCTN_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
5ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
6INVSTR_PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7INVSTR_ENTTY_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
8SCRTY_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
9LNG_SHRT_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_SCRTY_PSTN_TYPPFYStringDOMLong/Short balance sheet recognised security position type (Input Layer)
10SCRTY_PSTN_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_TYPPFYStringDOMSecurity position Balance sheet recognised type (Input Layer)
11TRTMNT_TRNSFRRD_ASSTS_BLNC_SHTYString (1) DOMTreatment of transferred assets in balance sheet
12ENCMBRD_CRRYNG_AMNTDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1RPRCHS_TRNSCTN_IDAn identifier applied by the reporting agent to uniquely identify each instrument under a single contract. Each instrument must have one instrument identifier. This value will not change over time and cannot be used as the instrument identifier for any other instrument under the same contract.
2DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
6INVSTR_PRTY_IDAn identifier that uniquely identifies a party.
7INVSTR_ENTTY_RL_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between different roles a party may act in. Examples are debtor, creditor, servicer.
8SCRTY_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
12ENCMBRD_CRRYNG_AMNTThe carrying amount in accordance with Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.

Table NameRPRCHS_TRNSCTN_NN_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_SCRTY_PSTN_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameRepurchase transaction Non-balance sheet recognised security position assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionRepurchase transaction Non-balance sheet recognised security position assignment is the combination of a  Repurchase transaction  and Non-balance sheet recognised security position
Notes
Number Of Columns16
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1RPRCHS_TRNSCTN_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2SCRTY_PSTN_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_TYPPFYStringDOMSecurity position Balance sheet recognised type (Input Layer)
3DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
4RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
5ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
6ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
7INVSTR_PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
8INVSTR_ENTTY_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
9SCRTY_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
10RPRCHS_TRNSCTN_NN_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_SCRTY_PSTN_ASSGNMNT_TYPYStringDOMRepurchase transaction Non-balance sheet recognised security position assignment type
11TYP_PRTCTN_VL_APPRCHYString (1) DOMType of protection valuation approach (Input Layer)
12DT_ORGNL_PRTCTN_VLDateDOMAll possible dates
13DT_PRTCTN_VLDateDOMAll possible dates
14ENCMBRD_FVDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
15ORGNL_PRTCTN_VLDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
16PRTCTN_ALLCTD_VLDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1RPRCHS_TRNSCTN_IDAn identifier applied by the reporting agent to uniquely identify each instrument under a single contract. Each instrument must have one instrument identifier. This value will not change over time and cannot be used as the instrument identifier for any other instrument under the same contract.
3DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
4RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
5ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
7INVSTR_PRTY_IDAn identifier that uniquely identifies a party.
8INVSTR_ENTTY_RL_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between different roles a party may act in. Examples are debtor, creditor, servicer.
9SCRTY_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
11TYP_PRTCTN_VL_APPRCHType of protection valuation approach.
12DT_ORGNL_PRTCTN_VLThe date of the protection’s original value, i.e. the date on which the latest appraisal or valuation of the protection was carried out prior to its initial receipt as a credit protection.
13DT_PRTCTN_VLProtection value date is the date on which the latest appraisal or valuation of the protection was carried out prior to the reporting reference date.
14ENCMBRD_FVFair value as defined in IFRS 13.9.
15ORGNL_PRTCTN_VLThe protection’s fair value at the date when it was originally received as a credit protection.
16PRTCTN_ALLCTD_VLThe maximum amount of the protection value that can be considered as credit protection for the instrument. The amount of the existing third parties or observed agent priority claims against the protection must be excluded in the protection allocated value. For protections that is eligible under Regulation (EU) No 575/2013, this value should be reported in accordance with Part 2 of Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.

RPRCHS_TRNSCTN_NN_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_SCRTY_PSTN_ASSGNMNT_TYP
Values List
ValueDescription
1(Reverse) Repurchase transaction Non-balance sheet recognised security position (received) assignment
2Repurchase transaction Non-balance sheet recognised security position (given) assignment
TYP_PRTCTN_VL_APPRCH
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Counterparty estimation: Valuation method whereby the valuation is carried out by the provider of the protection.
2Creditor valuation: Valuation method whereby the valuation is carried out by the creditor: valuation undertaken by an external or staff appraiser who possesses the necessary qualifications, ability and experience to execute a valuation and who is not independent from the credit decision process.
3Mark-to-market: Valuation method whereby the protection value is based on unadjusted quoted prices for identical assets and liabilities in an active market.
4Other type of valuation: Other type of valuation not included in any other valuation categories.
5Third-party valuation: Valuation method in which the valuation is provided by an appraiser who is independent from the credit decision process.
