Table NameRSK_FAC_SA
Functional NameRisk factor for standardised approach
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionRisk factor for standardised approach is a set of variables (eg an equity price or a tenor of an interest rate curve) that affect the value of an instrument as defined in MAR21.8 to MAR21.14. (https://www.bis.org/basel_framework/chapter/MAR/21.htm?inforce=20230101&published=20200327#paragraph_MAR_21_20230101_21_8)
Notes
Number Of Columns16
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
2RSK_FCTR_IDPYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
5RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6PRTY_IDFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7ENTTY_RL_TYPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
8ASST_BCKD_SCRTY_IDFString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
9BS_CRRNCYYString (3) DOMSubdomain for domain ISO-4217 Currency Codes (ISO4217 Domain) (Input Layer)
10CMMDTY_TYPYString (2) DOMCommodity type (Input Layer)
11CRDT_SPRD_RSK_CRDT_QLTYYString (1) DOMRating grade credit quality
12CRDT_SPRD_RSK_CRV_TYPYString (1) DOMCredit spread risk curve type
13EQUTY_FCTR_TYPYString (1) DOMEquity factor type
14GIRR_FCTR_TYPYString (1) DOMGIRR risk factor
15RSK_CLSSYString (1) DOMRisk class
16DLVRY_LCTNString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
2RSK_FCTR_IDRisk factor identifier is a number that uniquely identifies the Risk factor.
3DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
6PRTY_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
7ENTTY_RL_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between different roles a party may act in. Examples are debtor, creditor, servicer.
8ASST_BCKD_SCRTY_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
9BS_CRRNCYThe currency code according to ISO4217.
10CMMDTY_TYPThe type of commodity, taken from Commodity Type Domain
11CRDT_SPRD_RSK_CRDT_QLTYThe rating grade to which the credit spread risk curve realtes
12CRDT_SPRD_RSK_CRV_TYPThe type of Curve (CDS or BOND)
13EQUTY_FCTR_TYPEquity factor type classifies Equity risk factorf into Spot or Repo Equity Risk Factor.
14GIRR_FCTR_TYPGeneral interest rate risk (GIRR) factor type is the type of interest rate risk factor. Can be Yield, Basis or Inflation
15RSK_CLSSRisk class is a defined list of risks that are used as the basis for calculating market risk capital requirements: general interest rate risk, credit spread risk (non-securitisation), credit spread risk (securitisation: non-correlation trading portfolio), credit spread risk (securitisation: correlation trading portfolio), FX risk, equity risk and commodity risk.
16DLVRY_LCTNThe delivery location related to the commodity Risk factor, typically the delivery location of a deliverable commodity future.

Table NameRTNG_AGNCY
Functional NameRating agency
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA (Credit) Rating agency is a credit rating agency that is registered or certified in accordance with Regulation (EC) No 1060/2009 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 16 September 2009 on credit rating agencies or a central bank issuing credit ratings which are exempt from the application of Regulation (EC) No 1060/2009.
A Rating agency can be either an Extern Credit Assessment Institution (ECAI) or an Export Credit Agency (ECA).
An export credit agency (known in trade finance as an ECA) or investment insurance agency is a private or quasi-governmental institution that acts as an intermediary between national governments and exporters to issue export insurance solutions, guarantees for financing. The financing can take the form of credits (financial support) or credit insurance and guarantees (pure cover) or both, depending on the mandate the ECA has been given by its government. ECAs can also offer credit or cover on their own account. This does not differ from normal banking activities. Some agencies are government-sponsored, others private, and others a combination of the two.
Notes
Number Of Columns2
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1RTNG_AGNCY_NMPYString (250) DOMString-ASCII up to 250 characters
2ECAI_ECAYString (1) DOMECAI/ECA - full domain
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1RTNG_AGNCY_NMThe rating agency's name.
2ECAI_ECAIt distinguishes external credit assessments given by an ECAI, as defined by the CRR (Article 4(1)(98)), from those given by an Export Credit Agency (ECA).

Table NameRTNG_AGNCY_EXCSS_MTHDLGY_CVRD_BND_PRGRMM_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameRating agency excess methodology result Covered bond programme assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionRating agency excess methodology result Covered bond assignment is the combination of the Rating agency and the Covered bond that has the result of the credit rating agencies' methodology to maintain current external credit rating of the Covered bond issued with the Covered bond programme for calculating the excess of minimum coverage requirement.
Notes
Number Of Columns10
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1RTNG_AGNCY_NMPFYString (250) DOMString-ASCII up to 250 characters
2DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
6CVRD_BND_PRGRM_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7EXCSS_CVRG_ASST_SPCFC_VLYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
8EXCSS_CVRG_NMNL_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
9EXCSS_CVRG_PRSNT_VL_MRKT_VLYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
10RTNG_AGNCY_RNKYIntegerDOMInteger
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1RTNG_AGNCY_NMThe rating agency's name.
2DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
6CVRD_BND_PRGRM_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each covered bond program.
7EXCSS_CVRG_ASST_SPCFC_VLExcess coverage asset-specific value is the aggregate of the Excess coverage asset-specific value of the assets in the cover pool according to the rating agency. 

The asset-specific value is the economic value of the cover pool assets, as may be described by a fair value according to IFRS 13, a market value observable from executed transactions in liquid markets, or a present value that would discount future cash flows of an asset by an assetspecific interest rate curve.

8EXCSS_CVRG_NMNL_AMNTExcess coverage nominal amount is the amount in excess of the minimum coverage required with regards to the nominal amount in via the methodology of the Rating agency for the Covered bond programme.

Nominal amount is the sum of claims to payment of principal, determined in accordance with the respective statutory covered bond regime's rules that apply for determining sufficient coverage. 
9EXCSS_CVRG_PRSNT_VL_MRKT_VLExcess coverage present value(swap) / market value is the aggregate of the present value (swap) of the cover pool and the market value of the derived assets in the cover pool according to the rating agency. 

The asset-specific value is the economic value of the cover pool assets, as may be described by a fair value according to IFRS 13, a market value observable from executed transactions in liquid markets, or a present value that would discount future cash flows of an asset by an assetspecific interest rate curve.
10RTNG_AGNCY_RNKRating agency rank is a number describing the order in which the Rating agency is reported in Asset Encumbrance covered bond issuance. 

Note: the value must be unique within the Covered bond programme.

Table NameRTNG_SYSTM
Functional NameRating system
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA (Credit) Rating system is a system that evaluates the the creditworthiness of a borrower in general terms or with respect to a particular debt or financial obligation [based on https://www.investopedia.com/terms/c/creditrating.asp].
Notes
Number Of Columns5
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1RTNG_SYSTM_NMPYString (250) DOMString-ASCII up to 250 characters
2RTNG_AGNCY_NMPFYString (250) DOMString-ASCII up to 250 characters
3RTNG_SYSTM_TYP_BY_NTRYString (1) DOMRating system type by nature (Grade vs. Numeric) type
4RTNG_SYSTM_TYP_BY_TRGTYString (1) DOMRating system type by target (Input Layer)
5SHRT_TRM_CRDT_ASSSSMNT_INDCTRYString (1) DOMShort term credit assessment indicator
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1RTNG_SYSTM_NMThe rating system's name.
2RTNG_AGNCY_NMThe rating agency's name.
3RTNG_SYSTM_TYP_BY_NTRA discriminator to distinguish between different rating systems by nature, like grade based or numeric rating systems.
5SHRT_TRM_CRDT_ASSSSMNT_INDCTRAn indicator specifying if a rating system is a short term credit assessment or not.

Table NameRTNG_SYSTM_APPLD_LGL_PRSN
Functional NameRating system applied to a Legal person
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA Rating system applied to a Party is the combination of a Numeric rating system and a Party that indicates which Party is evaluated based on which Numeric rating system with which Probability of Default.
Notes
Number Of Columns8
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1RTNG_SYSTM_NMPFYString (250) DOMString-ASCII up to 250 characters
2RTNG_AGNCY_NMPFYString (250) DOMString-ASCII up to 250 characters
3PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
4DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
5RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
7ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
8PDYDECIMALDOMReal numbers from 0 to 1 with 6 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1RTNG_SYSTM_NMThe rating system's name.
2RTNG_AGNCY_NMThe rating agency's name.
3PRTY_IDAn identifier that uniquely identifies a party.
4DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
5RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
6ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
8PDThe counterparty’s probability of default over one year determined in accordance with Articles 160, 163, 179 and 180 of Regulation (EU) No 575/2013.

Table NameSBSDRY_JNT_VNTR_ASSCT_OTHR_ORGNSTN_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameSubsidiary, joint venture and associate Other organisation role assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA Subsidiary, joint venture and associate Central bank and private sector company role assignment is the combination of a Subsidiary, joint venture and associate and an Central bank and private sector company role that indicates which Subsidiary, joint venture and associate comprises which Central bank and private sector company role.
Notes
Number Of Columns17
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2GRP_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
4DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
5PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
7OTHR_ORGNSTN_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
8ACCMLTD_EQT_INTRSTYDECIMALDOMReal numbers from 0 to 1 with 6 decimals
9ACCNTNG_TRTMNT_CRRYString (1) DOMConsolidation method - full domain
10ACCNTNG_TRTMNT_IFRSYString (1) DOMConsolidation method - full domain
11ACQSTN_CSTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
12CRRYNG_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
13DT_ENTRYYDateDOMAll possible dates
14FV_INVSTMNTS_PBLSHD_PRC_QTTNSYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
15GDWLL_INVSTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
16SBSDRY_JNT_VNTR_ASSCT_OTHR_ORGNSTN_ASSGNMNT_TYPYString (1) DOMSubsidiary, joint venture and associate Other organisation role assignment
17VTNG_RGHTYDECIMALDOMReal numbers from 0 to 1 with 6 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
2GRP_IDThe group identifier of the involved subsidiary, joint venture and associate.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
4DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
5PRTY_IDThe party identifier of the involved organisation.
7OTHR_ORGNSTN_RL_TYPThe organisation role.
8ACCMLTD_EQT_INTRSTAccumulated equity interest (%)’ shall be the percentage of ownership instruments held by the institution as of the reference date FinRep Annex V 296.
9ACCNTNG_TRTMNT_CRRThe accounting treatment of the subsidiary, joint venture or associate with respect to the CRR group.
10ACCNTNG_TRTMNT_IFRSThe accounting treatment of the subsidiary, joint venture or associate with respect to the IFRS group.
11ACQSTN_CSTThe amount paid by the investors  FinRep Annex V 296.
12CRRYNG_AMNTThe carrying amount in accordance with Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.
13DT_ENTRYThe date in which the investee entered within the ‘scope of the group’ Annex V 296
14FV_INVSTMNTS_PBLSHD_PRC_QTTNSMeans the price at the reference date; it shall be provided only if the instruments are quoted.Annex V 296.
15GDWLL_INVSTThe amount of goodwill reported on the consolidated balance sheet of the reporting institution for the investee in the items ‘goodwill’ or ‘investments in subsidiaries, joint ventures and associated’ FinRep Annex V 296.
16SBSDRY_JNT_VNTR_ASSCT_OTHR_ORGNSTN_ASSGNMNT_TYPThe subsidiary, joint venture and associate type.
17VTNG_RGHTVoting rights in percent.

5ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)

Table NameSCRTY_BRRWNG_LNDNG_TRNSCTN_INCLDNG_CSH_CLLTRL
Functional NameSecurity borrowing and lending transaction including cash as collateral component
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA Securities borrowing and lending transaction including cash as collateral component is a component of a Securities borrowing and lending transaction, i.e. a Security borrowed, a Security lent or cash as collateral.
Notes
Number Of Columns10
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
2DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
5INSTRMNT_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6CRRNCYYString (3) DOMSubdomain for domain ISO-4217 Currency Codes (ISO4217 Domain) (Input Layer)
7SCRTY_BRRWNG_LNDNG_TRNSCTN_CMPNNT_TYP_BY_DRCTNYString (2) DOMSecurity borrowing and lending transaction component type by direction (Input layer)
8SCRTY_BRRWNG_LNDNG_TRNSCTN_INCLDNG_CSH_CLLTRL_TYPYString (1) DOMType of specific securities borrowing and lending transaction including cash as collateral component (Input Layer)
9NMBR_SHRSDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
10NMNL_AMNTDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
2DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5INSTRMNT_IDAn identifier applied by the reporting agent to uniquely identify each instrument under a single contract. Each instrument must have one instrument identifier. This value will not change over time and cannot be used as the instrument identifier for any other instrument under the same contract.
6CRRNCYThe currency code according to ISO4217.
7SCRTY_BRRWNG_LNDNG_TRNSCTN_CMPNNT_TYP_BY_DRCTNA discriminator to distinguish between different types of security borrowing and lending transaction components by direction.
9NMBR_SHRSThe number of shares of a security.
10NMNL_AMNTHolding amount at nominal value

Table NameSCRTY_CLLTRL_LNDNG_CMPNNT_SCRTY_CLLTRL_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameSecurity collateral lending component Security collateral assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionSecurity collateral lending component Security assignment is the combination of the Security collateral ending component and the Security collateral that indicates which Security collateral has been lent out via the Security collateral  lending component.
Notes
Number Of Columns6
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
4ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5CLLTRL_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6INSTRMNT_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5CLLTRL_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each collateral.

Table NameSCRTY_ENTTY_RL_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameSecurity Entity role assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA Security or Exchange tradable derivative Entity role assignment is the combination of a Security or Exchange tradable derivative and an Entity role that indicates which Security or Exchange tradable derivative is associated with which Entity role.
Notes
Number Of Columns10
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
3DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
4SCRTY_EXCHNG_TRDBL_DRVTV_IDPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
5PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
7ENTTY_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
8SCRTY_ENTTY_RL_ASSGNMNT_TYPYString (1) DOMSecurity Entity role assignment type
9MN_GRNTR_INDCTRYString (1) DOMMain guarantor indicator (Input Layer)
10PRMRY_ISSR_INDCTRYString (1) DOMPrimary issuer (Input Layer)
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
2ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
3DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
4SCRTY_EXCHNG_TRDBL_DRVTV_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
5PRTY_IDThe party identifier of the involved organisation.
7ENTTY_RL_TYPThe organisation role.
8SCRTY_ENTTY_RL_ASSGNMNT_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between different assignments between securities and party roles, like an assignment between securities and issues.
9MN_GRNTR_INDCTRMain guarantor indicator distinguishes between those guarantors that have to be reported as main guarantor based on reasonable and risk-prudent considerations (e.g., subordination of liabilities, extent of the contribution to the joint protection), and those that are subordinated to the main guarantors. 
(Guidance notes to reporting agents on SHS regulation)

Table NameSCRTY_EXCHNG_TRDBL_DRVTV
Functional NameSecurity and exchange tradable derivative
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA Security and exchange tradable derivative is a certificate attesting credit, the ownership of stocks or bonds, or the right to ownership connected with tradable derivatives.
Notes
Number Of Columns59
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
4ACCNTNG_STNDRDPYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5SCRTY_EXCHNG_TRDBL_DRVTV_IDPYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6ACCRD_INTRSTS_MRKT_VL_INDCTRYStringDOMAccrued interests for market values indicator (Input layer)
7CLLTRL_GGRPHCL_LCTN_SHSYString (4) DOMCollateral geographical location for SHS
8CRRNCYYString (3) DOMSubdomain for domain ISO-4217 Currency Codes (ISO4217 Domain)
9CRRNCY_TRNSCTN_RPRTDYString (3) DOMCurrency for transaction reported
10DBT_SCRTY_BY_ACCNTNG_STNDRDYString (2) DOMDebt security by accounting standard (Input Layer)
11DBT_SCRTY_PRFRMNG_STTS_TYPYString (2) DOMDebt security by performing status type (Input Layer)
12EHQLA_INDCTRYString (1) DOM(Extremely) High liquidity and credit quality (HQLA) indicator (Input Layer)
13ELGBL_CNTRL_BNK_FNDNG_INDCTRYString (1) DOMEligible for central bank fundung (Input Layer)
14ERLY_RDMPTNS_INCLDD_INDCTRYStringDOMEarly redemptions included indicator (Input Layer)
15EXCHNG_TRDBL_DRVTV_TYP_BY_IDNTFRYString (1) DOMExchange tradable derivative type by identifier (Input Layer)
16FRBRNC_MSR_TYPYString (2) DOMForbearance measure type
17IDNTFR_TYPYString (13) DOMIdentifier type (Input Layer)
18INTL_EXPSR_CLSS_SCRTYYString (2) DOMExposure classes for the calculation of risk weight (Input Layer)
19LSTD_INDCTRYString (1) DOMListed indicator (Input Layer)
20LW_CRDT_RSK_INDCTRYString (1) DOMLow credit risk indicator for FINREP (Input Layer)
21MLTPL_FRBRNC_MSRS_PLC_INDCTRYString (1) DOMMultiple forbearance measures in place indicator (Input Layer)
22NGTBL_SCRTY_INDCTRYString (1) DOMNegotiable security
23NN_PRFRMNG_EXT_CRTR_MT_INDCTRYString (1) DOMNon-performing exit criteria met indicator (Input Layer)
24OPTN_TYPYString (1) DOMOption type (Input Layer)
25PRFRMNG_FRBRN_EXPSR_UNDR_PRBTN_RCLSSFD_NN_PRFRMNG_INDCTRYString (1) DOMPerforming forborne exposure under probation reclassified from non-performing indicator (Input Layer)
26PRFRMNG_STTS_RSNYString (1) DOMPerforming status reason
27PRMRY_ASST_CLSSFCTNYString (6) DOMFull list of the classification of the instruments (Input Layer)
28PRPTL_DBT_SCRTY_INDCTRYString (2) DOMPerpetual debt security indicator (Input Layer)
29PST_DU_DBT_SCRTY_INDCTRYString (2) DOMPast due debt security indicator (Input layer)
30RL_ESTT_CLLTRL_LCTNYString (2) DOMISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code of the country (Input Layer)
31RNGTTD_DBT_SCRTY_TYPYStringDOMRenegotiated debt security type (Input Layer)
32SBRDNTD_DBTYString (1) DOMSubordinated debt indicator (Input Layer)
33SCRTY_EXCHNG_TRDBL_DRVTV_TYPYString (2) DOMType of security or exchange tradable derivative(Input Layer)
34SCRTY_GRNT_LVLYString (1) DOMFull list of the Security Guarantee level (Input Layer)
35SCRTY_LVLYString (1) DOMFull list of the security level (Input Layer)
36SCRTY_RNK_LVLYString (1) DOMFull list of the security rank level (Input Layer)
37SCRTY_STTSYString (3) DOMSecurity status (Input Layer)
38SCRTY_TYP_BY_IDNTFRYString (1) DOMSecurity type by identifier (Input Layer)
39SGNFCNT_ASST_CLSSYString (1) DOMSignificant asset class (Input Layer)
40SNRTYYString (1) DOMSeniority (Input Layer)
41STRCTRD_NT_INDCTRYString (1) DOMStructured note indicator (Input Layer)
42TYP_ASST_PRVDD_SCRTYYString (5) DOMType of asset provided as security (Input Layer)
43CMLTV_RCVRS_SNC_DFLTDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
44DT_FRBRNC_MSRSDateDOMAll possible dates
45DT_ISSDateDOMAll possible dates
46DT_LGL_FNL_MTRTYDateDOMAll possible dates
47DT_PRFRMNG_STTSDateDOMAll possible dates
48DT_PST_DDateDOMAll possible dates
49DT_RNGTTN_STTSDateDOMAll possible dates
50DT_SCRTY_STTSDateDOMAll possible dates
51EXPRTN_DTDateDOMAll possible dates
52FRBRNC_MSR_CNTIntegerDOMInteger
53ISINString (12) DOMString up to 12 characters - ISIN
54OFFCL_SCRTY_IDString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
55ORGNL_NMNL_AMNTDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
56SHRT_NM_INSTRMNTString (250) DOMString-ASCII up to 250 characters
57STRT_DTDateDOMAll possible dates
58TTL_AMNT_CPTL_ISSDDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
59TTL_NMBR_SHRS_ISSDDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5SCRTY_EXCHNG_TRDBL_DRVTV_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
6ACCRD_INTRSTS_MRKT_VL_INDCTRAn indicator specifying if accrued interest for market values are included or not. Further details may be found in the Guidance notes to reporting agents on SHS regulation (see https://www.ecb.europa.eu/pub/pdf/other/guidance_notes_to_reporting_agents_on_shs_regulation201705.en.pdf).
7CLLTRL_GGRPHCL_LCTN_SHSGeographical allocation of the underlying assets as defined by the SHS regulation.
8CRRNCYThe currency code according to ISO4217.
9CRRNCY_TRNSCTN_RPRTDCurrency of transaction reported
10DBT_SCRTY_BY_ACCNTNG_STNDRDDebt security by accounting standard classifies the Debt security according to the specific applicability of its figures for either IFRS or nGAAP.
11DBT_SCRTY_PRFRMNG_STTS_TYPPerforming status in accordance with Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.
12EHQLA_INDCTRAn indicator specifying if an asset or collateral received is considered extremely high liquidity and credit quality (HQLA) eligible according to Regulation (EU) 680/2014, Annex 17 (Asset encumbrance), part 2, 2.1.2, column 035.
13ELGBL_CNTRL_BNK_FNDNG_INDCTRSpecifies if an object is eligible for central bank funding in the sense that it might be exchanged / provided as collateral for funding.
14ERLY_RDMPTNS_INCLDD_INDCTRAn indicator specifying if early redemptions have been included.
15EXCHNG_TRDBL_DRVTV_TYP_BY_IDNTFRExchange tradable derivative type by identifier distinguishes between those Exchange tradable derivatives with an ISIN and those without.
16FRBRNC_MSR_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between refinanced debt, instruments with modified interest rate below market value and other modified terms.
17IDNTFR_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between different  identifier types for securities.
18INTL_EXPSR_CLSS_SCRTYThe exposure class, according to Regulation (EU) 575/2013, Article 112, that the security would be assigned to without applying any credit risk mitigation techniques.
19LSTD_INDCTRAn indicator specifying is a security is listed or not.
20LW_CRDT_RSK_INDCTRLow credit risk indicator for FINREP signals if a debt security or loan or advance has low credit risk or not, according to the Banks' internal assessments.
21MLTPL_FRBRNC_MSRS_PLC_INDCTRForbearance measures were granted in addition to already existing forbearance measures. It concerns forborne exposures under probation to which forbearance measures were applied in addition to forbearance measures granted at an earlier point in time, without the exposure having cured in between.
22NGTBL_SCRTY_INDCTRNegotiable security indicator indicates whether or not the ownership of the International securities identification number security is readily capable of being transferred from one unit to another by delivery or endorsement or of being offset in the case of financial derivatives.

While any security can be potentially traded, negotiable securties are designed to be traded on an organised exchange or over-the-counter, although actual trading is not a necessary condition for negotiability.
An instrument that does not fulfill these conditions is meant to be ‘non-negotiable’.
23NN_PRFRMNG_EXT_CRTR_MT_INDCTRNon-performing forborne exposures that failed to meet the non-performing exit criteria.
24OPTN_TYPOption type (put/call) indicates if the Exchange tradable option is a put option or a call option.
25PRFRMNG_FRBRN_EXPSR_UNDR_PRBTN_RCLSSFD_NN_PRFRMNG_INDCTRAn indicator specifying if an asset is classified as Non-performing forborne exposure under probation reclassified from non-performing or not according to Regulation (EU) 680/2014, Annex V, part 2.260.
26PRFRMNG_STTS_RSNThe reason for the choice of Performing status
27PRMRY_ASST_CLSSFCTNTruncated primary asset classification
28PRPTL_DBT_SCRTY_INDCTRPerpetual debt security indicator classifies debt security into those that do not have a maturity date and are therefor a Perpetual debt security, and those that do have a maturity date and are thus a Non-perpetual debty security
29PST_DU_DBT_SCRTY_INDCTRPast due debt security indicator classifies debt security into those that are currently performing, and those that are past due in accordance with Part 2.48 of Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.
30RL_ESTT_CLLTRL_LCTNThe country code of the location of the collateral according to ISO3166.
32SBRDNTD_DBTAn indicator specifying if an asset is considered as subordinated debt or not.
34SCRTY_GRNT_LVLIt defines the security ‘guarantee level’  whether the instrument is guaranteed by an entity different from the issuer, e.g. by the government. Further information may be found in the Guidance notes to reporting agents on SHS regulation (see https://www.ecb.europa.eu/pub/pdf/other/guidance_notes_to_reporting_agents_on_shs_regulation201705.en.pdf).
35SCRTY_LVLIt defines the ‘security level’ whether an instrument is secured or unsecured, i.e. whether there is recourse to the cash flows of a securitised portfolio.
36SCRTY_RNK_LVLA debt security's rank, like junior, mezanine or senior.
37SCRTY_STTSIndicates the status of the security, i.e. whether the instrument is alive (active) or not alive (not active).
38SCRTY_TYP_BY_IDNTFRA discriminator to distinguish between different securities by identifier, specifically ISIN and non-ISIN securities.
39SGNFCNT_ASST_CLSSSignificant asset class distinguishes Exchange tradable derivative into specific asset classes, like interest rate, equity, foreign exchange.
40SNRTYThe seniority of the security, e.g. junior, mezzanine, senior.
41STRCTRD_NT_INDCTRAn indicator specifying if a security is a structured note.
42TYP_ASST_PRVDD_SCRTYSpecifies the type of asset backed security or covered bond, e.g. mortgage backed securities.
43CMLTV_RCVRS_SNC_DFLTThe total amount recovered from the Debt security since the date of default.
44DT_FRBRNC_MSRSThe date on which forbearance measure have been applied.
45DT_ISSThe date on which the securities are delivered to the underwriter by the issuer against payment. This is the date when the securities are available for delivery to investors for the first time. Note: For a strip this column indicates the date on which the
46DT_LGL_FNL_MTRTYThe contractual maturity date of the asset or liability, taking into account any agreements amending initial contracts.
47DT_PRFRMNG_STTSThe date on which the performing status is considered to have been established or changed.
48DT_PST_DThe date on which the asset became past due in accordance with Part 2.48 of Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014. This is the latest such date prior to the reporting reference date and it is to be reported if the instrument is past due on the reporting reference date.
49DT_RNGTTN_STTSThe date on which the renegotiation status is considered to have been established or changed.
50DT_SCRTY_STTSIndicates the Date at which the Security Status has changed from alive to not-alive
51EXPRTN_DTThe Expiration date of an option is a date that is the last day on which the option holder can exercise their right to buy or sell the underlying asset. 
52FRBRNC_MSR_CNTNumber of times an exposure has been under forbearance measures. Exposures classified as forborne at the reporting reference date, to which forbearance measures have been applied at two, respectively more than two different points in time. That includes, among others, originally forborne exposures that exited the forborne status (cured forborne exposures), but were granted new forbearance measures after that.
53ISINISIN of the security.
54OFFCL_SCRTY_IDOfficial security identifier.
55ORGNL_NMNL_AMNTThe original nominal amount. E.g. for debt securities issued it is the nominal amount at issuance date.
56SHRT_NM_INSTRMNTThe name of the security.
57STRT_DTStart date is a date that indicates when the Exchange tradable derivative goes into effect.
58TTL_AMNT_CPTL_ISSDIt is the face value of the shares that have been issued to the shareholders.
59TTL_NMBR_SHRS_ISSDThe total number of shares issued.

Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1100Europe - No further geographical restrictions
1210Euro area - No further geographical restrictions
1280Euro area - Other geographical area (more than one country within the sub-region)
1290Euro area - No detailed classification available
1380EU member states that have not adopted the euro - Other geographical area (more than one country within the sub-region)
1390EU member states that have not adopted the euro - No detailed classification available
1810Europe - Other - No further geographical restrictions
1820Europe - Other - Nordic countries[1]
1830Europe - Other - Central and Eastern Europe[2]
1880Europe - Other - Other geographical concepts affecting more than one sub-region
1890Europe - Other - No detailed classification available
1900Europe - No detailed classification available
2100Americas - No further geographical restrictions
2210North America - No further geographical restrictions
2290North America - No detailed classification available
2310Central and South America - No further geographical restrictions
2380Central and South America - Other geographical area (more than one country within the sub-region)
2390Central and South America - No detailed classification available
2810Americas - Other - No further geographical restrictions
2880Americas - Other - Other geographical concepts affecting more than one sub-region

ELGBL_CNTRL_BNK_FNDNG_INDCTR
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable: To be used if central bank eligibility does not apply.
1Eligible for central bank funding: Specifies if an object is eligible for central bank funding in the sense that it might be exchanged / provided as collateral for funding.
2Not elibible for central bank funding: Specifies if an object is not eligible for central bank funding.

ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Grace period/payment moratorium
10Forborne: instruments with modified interest rate below market conditions
11Forborne: instruments with modified interest rate not below market conditions

ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1SA: Equity exposures
10SA: Exposures to international organisations

12SA: Exposures to public sector entities
13SA: Exposures to regional governments or local authorities
14SA: Items associated with a particular high risk

3SA: Exposures in the form of covered bonds
4SA: Exposures in the form of units or shares in CIUs

Table NameSCRTY_HDGD_EXCHNG_TRDBL_DRVTV
Functional NameSecurity position hedged by Exchange tradable derivative position
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionSecurity position hedged by Exchange tradable derivative position is the combination of a Long/short balance sheet recognised security position and an Exchange tradable derivative position as a hedge that indicates which (portion of a) Security position is hedged by which Exchange tradable derivative position as a hedge.
Notes
Number Of Columns15
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1SLLR_ENTTY_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
2SLLR_PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3BYR_ENTTY_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
4BYR_PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
5EXCHNG_TRDBL_DRVTV_PSTN_SCRTY_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
8ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
9INVSTR_PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
10INVSTR_ENTTY_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
11DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
12SCRTY_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
13LNG_SHRT_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_SCRTY_PSTN_TYPPFYStringDOMLong/Short balance sheet recognised security position type (Input Layer)
14EXCHNG_TRDBL_DRVTV_PSTN_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMExchange tradable derivative position role type (Input Layer)
15SCRTY_PSTN_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_TYPPFYStringDOMSecurity position Balance sheet recognised type (Input Layer)
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1SLLR_ENTTY_RL_TYPThe seller role.
2SLLR_PRTY_IDThe party identifier of the involved seller.
3BYR_ENTTY_RL_TYPThe buyer party role.
4BYR_PRTY_IDThe party identifier of the involved buyer.
5EXCHNG_TRDBL_DRVTV_PSTN_SCRTY_IDThe security identifier of the exchange tradable derivative.
6RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
7ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
9INVSTR_PRTY_IDAn identifier that uniquely identifies a party.
10INVSTR_ENTTY_RL_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between different roles a party may act in. Examples are debtor, creditor, servicer.
11DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
12SCRTY_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.

kind		Domain NameFormula

1RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
3INVSTR_ENTTY_RL_TYPPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
4DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
5ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)

7INVSTR_PRTY_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
8OWN_CMPNY_INVSTMNT_INDCTRYString (1) DOMOwn company investment indicator (Input Layer)
9SCRTY_EXCHNG_TRDBL_DRVTV_PSTN_TYPYString (1) DOMSecurity or Exchange tradable derivative position type
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
2ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
3INVSTR_ENTTY_RL_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between different roles a party may act in. Examples are debtor, creditor, servicer.
4DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
6SCRTY_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
7INVSTR_PRTY_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
8OWN_CMPNY_INVSTMNT_INDCTROwn company investment indicator is an indicator to Security position derived data, which determines if the investment in the Security position is in a subsidiary, joint venture or associate of the own company or not
9SCRTY_EXCHNG_TRDBL_DRVTV_PSTN_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between security positions and tradable derivative positions.

Table NameSCRTY_PSTN_HDGD_OTC_DRVTV
Functional NameSecurity position hedged by Over the counter (OTC) derivative
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA Security position hedged by Over the counter (OTC) derivative is the combination of a Long/Short balance sheet recognised security position and an Over the counter (OTC) derivative as a hedge that indicates which (portion of a Long/short balance sheet recognised security position is hedged by which Over the counter (OTC) derivative (acting in the role of an Over the counter (OTC) derivative as a hedge).
Notes
Number Of Columns12
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear

Input Layer 6.7

Table NameSGNFCNT_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CNTNGNT_ENCMBRNC
Functional NameSignificant currency 10% depreciation contingent encumbrance
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionContingent encumbrance refers to the additional assets which may need to be encumbered when the reporting institutions faces adverse developments triggered by an external event over which the reporting institution has no control (including a downgrade, decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets or a general loss of confidence). In these cases, the reporting institution will need to encumber additional assets as a consequence of already existing transactions. The additional amount of encumbered assets shall be net of the impact of the institution’s hedge transactions against the events described under the aforementioned stressed scenarios. (Annext 17 (Asset Encumbrance) 4. Part C)
Notes
Number Of Columns18
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level
4ACCNTNG_STNDRDPYString (1) DOMAccounting framework
5SGNFCNT_CRRNCYPYString (3) DOMSubdomain for domain ISO-4217 Currency Codes (ISO4217 Domain)
6CLLTRLSD_DPSTS_OTHR_RPRCHS_AGRMNTS_CNTRL_BNKS_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
7CLLTRLSD_DPSTS_OTHR_RPRCHS_AGRMNTS_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
8DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_ASST_BCKD_SCRTS_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
9DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
10DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_CVRD_BNDS_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
11DPSTS_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
12DRVTVS_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
13OTC_DRVTV_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
14OTHR_SRCS_ENCMBRNC_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
15RPRCHS_AGRMNT_CNTRL_BNK_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
16RPRCHS_AGRMNT_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
17SLCTD_FNNCL_LBLT_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
18TTL_SRCS_ENCMBRNC_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5SGNFCNT_CRRNCYSignificant currency is that currency that the reporting agent has deemed significant for the purpose of reporting Asset Encubrance Contingent scenario 'Significant currency depreciation'. It contains the currency code according to ISO4217.
6CLLTRLSD_DPSTS_OTHR_RPRCHS_AGRMNTS_CNTRL_BNKS_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTCollateralised deposits other than repurchase agreements with central banks 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate Collateralised deposits other than repurchase agreement liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.
7CLLTRLSD_DPSTS_OTHR_RPRCHS_AGRMNTS_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTCollateralised deposits other than repurchase agreements 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate Collateralised deposits other than repurchase agreement liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.
8DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_ASST_BCKD_SCRTS_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTDebt securities issued as asset-backed securities issued 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate Debt securities issued as asset-backed securities liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.
9DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTDebt securities issued 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate Debt securities issued liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.
10DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_CVRD_BNDS_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTDebt securities issued as covered bonds issued 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate Debt securities issued as covered bond Debt securities issued as covered bonds issued liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.
11DPSTS_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTDeposits 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate deposit liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.
12DRVTVS_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTDerivatives 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate derivative liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.
13OTC_DRVTV_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTOver-The-Counter (OTC) derivatives 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate Over-The-Counter (OTC) derivative liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.
14OTHR_SRCS_ENCMBRNC_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTOther sources of encumbrance 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate liabilities that are other sources of encumbrance amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.
15RPRCHS_AGRMNT_CNTRL_BNK_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTRepurchase agreements with central banks 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate Repurchase agreements with central bank liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.
16RPRCHS_AGRMNT_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTRepurchase agreements 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate repurchase agreements liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.
17SLCTD_FNNCL_LBLT_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTSelected financial liablities 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.
18TTL_SRCS_ENCMBRNC_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNTTotal sources of encumbrance 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.

Table NameSHRT_BLNC_SHT_RCGNSD_SCRTY_PSTN_PRDNTL_PRTFL_ASSGNMNT
Functional NameShort balance sheet recognised security position prudential portfolio assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA Long  balance sheet recognised security position prudential portfolio assignment is the combination of a Long balance sheet recognised security position prudential portfolio assignment and a Prudential portfolio that indicates which security position is assigned to which Prudential portfolio.

Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999

Table NameSNTHTC_SCRTSTN
Functional NameSynthetic securitisation
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionRegulation (EU) 2402/2017, Article 2(10):
‘Synthetic securitisation’ means a securitisation where the transfer of risk is achieved by the use of credit derivatives or guarantees, and the exposures being securitised remain exposures of the originator.
Notes
Number Of Columns13
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
4ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5SCRTSTN_IDPYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6ASST_PL_IDFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7PRCNTG_RTNDYDECIMALDOMReal numbers from 0 to 1 with 6 decimals
8RSCRTSTN_INDCTRYString (1) DOMRe-securitisation indicator
9SCRTSTN_OTHR_CRDT_TRNSFR_TYPYString (1) DOMSecuritisation and other credit transfer type
10SCRTSTN_TYPYString (1) DOMSecuritisation type
11SGNFCNT_RSK_TRNSFR_INDCTRYString (1) DOMSignificant risk transfer indicator
12SNTHTC_SCRTSTN_TYPYString (1) DOMSynthetic securitisation type
13STS_SCRTSTN_INDCTRYString (1) DOMSimple, transparent and standardised (STS) securitisation indicator
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5SCRTSTN_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
6ASST_PL_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each asset pool.
7PRCNTG_RTNDThe percentage that has been retained.
8RSCRTSTN_INDCTRAn indicator specifying if a securitisation is considered a re-securitisation.
9SCRTSTN_OTHR_CRDT_TRNSFR_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between different types of securitisations and other credit transfer, like securitisation and covered bond programs.
10SCRTSTN_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between different types of securitisations like traditional and sysnthetic securitisation.
11SGNFCNT_RSK_TRNSFR_INDCTRAn indicator specifying if a securitisation establishes a significant risk transfer according to Regulation (EU) 575/2013, Article 243 (2) and Article 244 (2).
12SNTHTC_SCRTSTN_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between synthetic securitisations with and without involvement of securitisation special purpose entities (SSPEs).
13STS_SCRTSTN_INDCTRAn indicator specifying if a securitisation is considered a simple, transparent and standardised (STS) securitisation acccording to Regulation (EU) 2402/2017, Article 19.
Indexes
Index NameStateFunctionalSpatialExpressionColumn NameSort
Order

Table NameSYNDCTD_CNTRCT
Functional NameSyndicated contract
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionSyndicated contract is the overall contract of the syndication in the administration of the lead arranger of the syndicated contract.
Notes
Number Of Columns1
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1SYNDCTD_CNTRCT_IDPYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1SYNDCTD_CNTRCT_ID 'Contract identifier' applied by the lead arranger of the syndicated contract to uniquely identify each contract. Each syndicated contract will have one 'syndicated contract identifier'. This value will not change over time and cannot be used by the lead arranger as the contract identifier for any other contract. All creditors participating in the syndicated contract must use the same 'syndicated contract identifier'.
Indexes

Table NameTRDTNL_SCRTSTN
Functional NameDiscount or excess spread
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionRegulation (EU) 2402/2017, Article 2 (9):
´Traditional securitisation’ means a securitisation involving the transfer of the economic interest in the exposures being securitised through the transfer of ownership of those exposures from the originator to an SSPE or through sub-participation by an SSPE, where the securities issued do not represent payment obligations of the originator. 
Notes
Number Of Columns14
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear

Input Layer 6.7

kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation

5DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
6CRDT_FCLTY_IDFString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7ASST_PL_IDFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore

13STS_SCRTSTN_INDCTRYString (1) DOMSimple, transparent and standardised (STS) securitisation indicator
14DSCNT_EXCSS_SPRD_AMNTDECIMALDOMNon-negative real numbers with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
3SCRTSTN_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
4RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
5DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
6CRDT_FCLTY_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each credit facility.
7ASST_PL_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each asset pool.
8PRCNTG_RTNDThe percentage that has been retained.
9RSCRTSTN_INDCTRAn indicator specifying if a securitisation is considered a re-securitisation.
10SCRTSTN_OTHR_CRDT_TRNSFR_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between different types of securitisations and other credit transfer, like securitisation and covered bond programs.
11SCRTSTN_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between different types of securitisations like traditional and sysnthetic securitisation.
12SGNFCNT_RSK_TRNSFR_INDCTRAn indicator specifying if a securitisation establishes a significant risk transfer according to Regulation (EU) 575/2013, Article 243 (2) and Article 244 (2).
13STS_SCRTSTN_INDCTRAn indicator specifying if a securitisation is considered a simple, transparent and standardised (STS) securitisation acccording to Regulation (EU) 2402/2017, Article 19.
14DSCNT_EXCSS_SPRD_AMNTThe amount of discount in a traditional securitisation.

Table NameTRNCH_SYNTHTC_SCRTSTN_WTHT_SSPE_DPST
Functional NameTranche in a synthetic securitisation without securitisation special purpose entity (SSPE) being a deposit
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA Tranche in a synthetic securitisation without securitisation special purpose entity (SSPE) being a Deposit is a Tranche in a synthetic securitisation without securitisation special purpose entity (SSPE) that is a Deposit (acting as a collateral).
Notes
Number Of Columns10
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1SCRTSTN_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
4INSTRMNT_IDPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
5ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
6ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
7SCRTSTN_TRNCH_TYPYString (1) DOMSecuritisation tranche type
8TRNCH_SYNTHTC_SCRTSTN_WTHT_SSPE_TYPYString (1) DOMTranche in a synthetic securitisation without SSPE type
9TRNCH_IDString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
10TRNCH_NMString (250) DOMString-ASCII up to 250 characters
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1SCRTSTN_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
2RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
4INSTRMNT_IDThe instrument identifier of the involved deposit.
5ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
7SCRTSTN_TRNCH_TYPType of securitisation tranche distinguishes Securitisation tranche according to the type of securitisation that is used to tranche the pool.
8TRNCH_SYNTHTC_SCRTSTN_WTHT_SSPE_TYPA discriminator to distinguish between different tranches in a synthetic securitisation, specifically between financial guarantees and deposits.
9TRNCH_IDTranche identifier is a number that uniquely identifies the Tranche.
10TRNCH_NMTranche name is a free-format text that identifies how the tranche is colloquially known.

Table NameTRNCH_TRDTNL_SCRTSTN
Functional NameTranche in a Traditional securitisation
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionRegulation (EU) 2402/2017, Article 2, (6):
´Tranche’ means a contractually established segment of the credit risk associated with an exposure or a pool of exposures, where a position in the segment entails a risk of credit loss greater than or less than a position of the same amount in another segment, without taking account of credit protection provided by third parties directly to the holders of positions in the segment or in other segments.
Notes
Number Of Columns9
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Input Layer 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1SCRTSTN_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2DT_RFRNCPFYDateDOMAll possible dates
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDPFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
5ACCNTNG_STNDRDPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
6SCRTY_IDPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7SCRTSTN_TRNCH_TYPYString (1) DOMSecuritisation tranche type
8TRNCH_IDString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
9TRNCH_NMString (250) DOMString-ASCII up to 250 characters
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1SCRTSTN_IDAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
2DT_RFRNCThe date the data refers to.
3RPRTNG_AGNT_IDIdentifier of the reporting agent.
4ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVLAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
6SCRTY_IDThe security identifier of the involved asset backed security.
7SCRTSTN_TRNCH_TYPType of securitisation tranche distinguishes Securitisation tranche according to the type of securitisation that is used to tranche the pool.
8TRNCH_IDTranche identifier is a number that uniquely identifies the Tranche.
9TRNCH_NMTranche name is a free-format text that identifies how the tranche is colloquially known.
